LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_9.english: If you trust people that easily, you'll get hurt badly someday.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_9.korean: 그렇게 쉽게 사람을 믿으면 언젠가 크게 당할 걸?

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_90.english: After all, I got covered in filth helping you, too.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_90.korean: 그야 나도 널 도와주느라 오물을 뒤집어 썼으니까?

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_91.english: You're visiting me quite often today.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_92.english: So, what's going on this time?

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_93.english: Hmm? It doesn't look like you changed your hairstyle...
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_93.korean: 음? 머리 스타일 바꾼 것 같지는 않고…

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_94.english: Or maybe put on some makeup...? No, not that either...
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_94.korean: 아니면 화장을 좀…? 아니, 그것도 아니고…

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_95.english: It's hard to answer if you ask if anything has suddenly changed.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_95.korean: 갑자기 달라진 게 있냐고 하면 답하기 힘들잖아.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_96.english: So, what has changed? I don't think it's my appearance.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_96.korean: 그러니까 뭐가 달라진 건데? 외모 쪽은 아닌 것 같은데.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_97.english: It's a basic requirement for a commander.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_98.english: In that case, my answer is the same. Nothing has changed.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_98.korean: 그거라면 내 대답은 같아. 달라진 건 없어.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_99.english: Right. But the fact that you said your 'thoughts have changed' yourself means something has changed, doesn't it?
LastCorruptedRecord3-10ED_99.korean: 그래. 하지만, 네가 스스로 ‘생각이 바뀌었다’고 한 건 달라진 거잖아?

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_10.english: It’s not like it’s impossible, but you’re being uncharacteristically polite. Aren’t you going to say something like, "If you don’t lower your eyes, I’ll trample you"?
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_10.korean: 그야 안될 거 없지만, 너답지 않게 예의 바르네.&n'눈 깔지 않으면 밟아버린다' 같은 말은 안 해?

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_101.english: You, really... Haa, never mind. It's just a headache for me to worry about it for no reason.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_101.korean: 너, 진짜… 하아, 됐다.&n괜히 신경 써봤자 나만 머리 아프지.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_102.english: I'm telling you this: I have no intention of saving you if you get into a dangerous situation, so you'd better handle it yourself.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_102.korean: 대신 말해두는데, 위험한 상황이 와도 구해줄 생각 없으니까 알아서 잘 처신해.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_104.english: ... I guess that's a question that needs to be answered seriously.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_105.english: Then, honestly speaking… Efnell, I can't see any of your convictions at all.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_105.korean: 그렇다면 솔직히 말해서… 에프넬, 네 신념은 전혀 보이지 않아.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_106.english: Conversely, are you saying you would do anything as long as there is a fair price?
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_106.korean: 반대로 정당한 대가만 있다면 뭐든지 한다는 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_107.english: Then how about we try to find that belief today by talking with the Strikers?
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_107.korean: 그럼 오늘은 스트라이커즈 애들과 대화하면서 그 신념을 찾아보는 건 어때?

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_108.english: If it is a serious concern for Fnel, I will definitely be happy to help.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_108.korean: 에프넬의 진지한 고민이라면, 분명 기꺼이 도와줄 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_109.english: You have to find the answer yourself!

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_11.english: Why bother with a guy who isn't even a stranger? Let's just talk things out nicely.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_11.korean: 타인도 아닌 녀석한테 뭐 하러?&n그냥 좋게 좋게 서로 이야기나 하자고.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_110.english: How was it? Did you find the answer you were looking for?

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_111.english: So you're saying you chose me as your final discussion partner? I'm actually happy about that.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_111.korean: 마지막 논의 상대로 날 선택했다는 거야? 이거 기쁜데?

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_112.english: I happen to have one, though.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_113.english: No, wait. It's dangerous alone, so together with another Striker member—
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_113.korean: 아니, 잠깐만. 혼자서는 위험하니까 다른 스트라이커 멤버랑 같이—

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_114.english: Okay. If you say that, there must be a reason.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_114.korean: 알았어. 네가 그렇게 말한다면 나름 이유가 있겠지.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_115.english: I told you not to let the others join in. Then I have no choice but to come myself.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_115.korean: 다른 애들은 끼게 하지 말랬잖아. 그러면 내가 직접 올 수밖에.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_12.english: Haha, it's refreshing to see you this gentle side. Okay, what do you want to talk about?
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_12.korean: 하하, 순한 네 모습도 신선하네. 좋아, 무슨 얘기를 하고 싶은데?

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_13.english: Of course, it is a way to become stronger than you are now.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_13.korean: 그야 물론 지금보다 더 강해질 방법이지.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_14.english: Since you are inside me, you must know something, right? Hurry up and spit out at least one thing.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_14.korean: 넌 내 안에 있는 존재니까 뭔가 알고 있겠지? 얼른 하나쯤 뱉어봐.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_15.english: Do you really need to get stronger? Don't you think you're strong enough as you are?
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_15.korean: 정말 더 강해질 필요가 있겠어? 지금도 충분히 강하다고 생각하지 않아?

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_16.english: So what? The more money and power you have, the better. There's nothing wrong with that.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_16.korean: 뭐 어때? 돈이랑 힘은 많을수록 좋지, 나쁠 건 없잖아.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_17.english: Is that all? Then why don't you just set a goal for whatever it is?
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_17.korean: 단지 그것뿐?&n그렇다면 뭐든지 일단 목표를 만드는  게 어때?

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_18.english: Just as you save money when you want to buy something, you desire power more when you want to win something.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_18.korean: 돈도 사고 싶은 게 있을 때 모으는 거고, 힘도 이기고 싶은 게 있을 때 더 원하게 되는 거니까.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_19.english: You should have at least one belief worth trying.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_19.korean: 시도해볼 만한 신념을 하나쯤 가져보는 거지.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_20.english: Beliefs… I’ve never really thought deeply about that. I’ve just blindly wanted to kill and thought I had to survive.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_20.korean: 신념이라… 깊게 고민해 본 적은 없네.&n그냥 무작정 죽이고 싶다, 살아남아야 한다는 생각만 해왔을 뿐이니까.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_21.english: I did think my life was just about being led around. I felt so empty when I heard that the guys who made me this way were all already dead by the time I found them.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_21.korean: 이끌려 다니기만 하는 인생이라는 생각은 했어.&n날 이렇게 만든 놈들을 찾았을 땐 이미 전부 죽어 버렸다는 말을 듣고서 얼마나 허무했는데.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_22.english: Beliefs... I suppose it might have felt less futile if I had a goal. Then you suggest one. What would be a good belief for me to adopt?
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_22.korean: 신념이라… 확실히 목표 같은 게 있다면 덜 허무했을지도 모르겠네.&n그럼 네가 하나 던져줘 봐. 내가 뭘 신념으로 삼으면 좋을지.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_23.english: Beliefs aren't something you create just by receiving a donation from someone, are they? Why don't you think about it for yourself?
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_23.korean: 신념이란 게 그렇게 누군가에게 기부받아서 생기는 게 아니잖아?&n스스로 생각해 보는 게 어때?

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_24.english: You contemplate and figure out the beliefs that already exist within you.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_24.korean: 이미 네 안에 존재하는 신념을 고민하고, 알아내는 거지.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_25.english: Do I already have a belief? Really? Is there actually something to it? Do you know?
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_25.korean: 이미 나한테 신념이? 진짜로?&n뭔가 있긴 한가? 넌 알아?

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_26.english: Why are you asking me your problem…
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_26.korean: 네 문제를 왜 나한테 묻는 건데…

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_27.english: Belief... belief, I suppose... I do have the thought that I want to make a lot of money.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_27.korean: 신념… 신념이라… 돈을 많이 벌고 싶다는 생각은 있는데.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_28.english: Money is just a means to you, not the goal.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_28.korean: 돈은 네게 수단일 뿐이지, 목표는 아니잖아.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_29.english: Haa... well, never mind. I'll take some more time to think about what you said.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_29.korean: 하아… 뭐, 됐어.&n네가 말한 건 좀 더 시간을 두고 고민해 볼게.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_3.english: So you finally made it this far. I've been waiting.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_30.english: - On the day of the last virtual combat training, Efnell came to find me.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_30.korean: - 마지막 가상 전투 훈련이 있는 날, 에프넬이 나를 찾아왔다.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_31.english: Wallet, I came today on some personal business. Actually, it’s closer to a consultation than business, though.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_31.korean: 지갑, 오늘은 개인적인 용무가 있어서 왔어.&n사실 용무라기 보다는 상담 쪽에 가깝지만.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_32.english: What kind of convictions do you think I fight with?
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_32.korean: 네가 보기엔 내가 어떤 신념을 가지고 싸우는 것 같아?

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_33.english: Of course. I didn't come here to joke around, so just say anything.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_33.korean: 그럼 당연하지. 농담하러 온 게 아니니까 아무거나 말해 봐.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_34.english: Well, that's true. I think so too.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_35.english: But if you are strong without conviction, isn't that okay in its own way? It just means the human being is strong, doesn't it?
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_35.korean: 근데 신념 없이 강하다면, 그건 그거대로 괜찮은 거 아냐?&n그냥 인간 자체가 강하다는 의미잖아?

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_36.english: Of course, no matter how strong they are, humanity and everyone else wouldn't fight without a fair price.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_36.korean: 물론, 아무리 강해도 정당한 대가가 없으면 인류고 뭐고 싸우지 않겠지만.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_37.english: Don't interpret things however you want. No matter how much money you offer, I have no intention of doing just anything.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_37.korean: 멋대로 해석하지 마.&n아무리 돈을 많이 줘도 뭐든지 할 생각은 없어.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_38.english: Yeah, since I've come all this way, I'll wander around a bit. In the end, my wallet was of absolutely no help~
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_38.korean: 그래, 기껏 여기까지 왔으니까 좀 돌아다녀 볼게.&n결국 지갑 넌 하나도 도움이 안 됐고~

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_4.english: … Wow, you look exactly like me. Though you're black.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_40.english: What? Are you talking about the beliefs Mr. Fnel holds?
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_40.korean: 네? 에프넬 씨가 가진 신념 말씀이신가요?

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_41.english: You've brought another difficult question this time.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_41.korean: 이번엔 또 어려운 질문을 들고 오셨네요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_42.english: Anything is fine. You know, if I know what my beliefs are, I might become stronger.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_42.korean: 뭐든 좋아, 나의 신념이 뭔지 알면 더 강해질지도 모르잖아.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_43.english: No matter how much I think about it… she doesn’t seem like someone who would fight with conviction.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_43.korean: 아무리 생각해도… 신념을 가지고 싸울 분 같지는 않사와요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_44.english: Still, if there is something, wouldn't it be money as a conviction? I think Miss Fnel is someone who would do anything for money.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_44.korean: 그래도 뭔가 있다고 한다면 돈이 신념이지 않겠사와요?&n에프넬 양은 돈을 위해서라면 뭐든지 할 수 있는 분이라고 생각해요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_45.english: … I thought so too, but since it was already rejected, let's move on.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_45.korean: …그건 나도 그렇게 생각했는데, 이미 기각당했으니 넘어가고.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_47.english: So you are saying that there might be beliefs you hold onto, even if unconsciously.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_47.korean: 무의식적으로라도 지키고 계신 신념이 있을 수도 있다는 말씀이군요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_49.english: In that case, I don't think there is any need to worry too deeply. Isn't your personality itself your conviction, Fnel?
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_49.korean: 그렇다면 깊게 고민할 필요도 없을 것 같아요.&n에프넬 씨의 성격 그 자체가 곧 신념 아닐까요?

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_5.english: After all, I am your shadow. It’s only natural that we look exactly alike.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_5.korean: 그야 나는 네 그림자니까.&n외형이 똑같은 건 당연하지.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_50.english: For example, an indomitable will that is never broken by others...
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_50.korean: 예를 들어, 언제나 남에게 꺾이지 않는 불굴의 의지라던가…

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_51.english: In our Orca, we have a captain of the Steel Line unit known as 'Indomitable Marie.' It is said that she earned that nickname because of her unyielding and strong mental fortitude.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_51.korean: 저희 오르카에는 ‘불굴의 마리’라고 불리는 스틸라인 부대의 대장님이 계세요.&n꺾이지 않는 강인한 정신력 때문에 그런 이명을 얻으셨다고 해요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_52.english: So, Ms. Fnel, how about you inherit that belief and become something like 'Indomitable Fnel'?
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_52.korean: 그러니까 에프넬 씨도 그 신념을 이어받아 ‘불굴의 에프넬’ 같은 건 어떠세요?

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_53.english: What…? Indomitable? What’s that? I don’t like it. No, more importantly, is there really someone in Orca called that…?
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_53.korean: 뭐어…? 불굴? 그게 뭐야. 마음에 안 드는데?&n아니, 그보다 진짜 오르카에 그렇게 불리는 사람이 있다고…?

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_54.english: Yes, you are truly an amazing person. Is there something wrong with you by any chance?
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_54.korean: 네, 정말 대단한 분이세요. 혹시 무슨 문제라도 있으신가요?

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_55.english: Ah, it's nothing. … Anyway, it's definitely not 'indomitable'. No!
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_55.korean: 아, 아무것도 아냐.&n…아무튼 ‘불굴’은 절대 아니야. 안 돼!

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_57.english: How about this? Belief is sour seasoning—

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_58.english: Okay, my big one. The adults are having an important conversation right now, so let's be quiet.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_58.korean: 자, 덩치 큰 우리 딸.&n지금 어른들끼리 중요한 대화 중이니까 조용히 있자~

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_6.english: So who are you? Why did you suddenly show up, and where is this place?
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_6.korean: 그래서 넌 뭐야? 갑자기 왜 나타난 거고, 여긴 또 어디야?

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_60.english: Ahaha, it looks like you're seriously considering this. I'm not sure if this will be helpful, but I have a good idea.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_60.korean: 아하하, 아무래도 진지하게 고민하고 계신 것 같네요.&n도움이 될진 모르겠지만 좋은 방법이 있어요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_62.english: It might sound a little uncomfortable, but... try recalling the moment you were most frustrated with in your life.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_62.korean: 조금 불편하게 들리실 수도 있지만…&n자신의 삶에서 가장 분했던 순간을 떠올려 보는 거예요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_63.english: Because anger is one of the most primal instincts.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_63.korean: 분노는 가장 원초적인 본능 중 하나니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_64.english: That's unexpected. I never thought the word 'anger' would come out of your mouth.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_64.korean: 의외네. 네 입에서 ‘분노’라는 말이 나올 줄이야.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_65.english: get angry sometimes, too. I've even gotten angry at Tiamat.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_65.korean: 저도 화날 때가 있는 걸요.&n티아멧한테도 화낸 적 있고요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_66.english: Ah, yeah. I'm not entirely sure, but I know for sure that I shouldn't make you angry.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_66.korean: 아, 응. 잘은 모르겠지만, 널 화나게 하면 안 되겠다는 건 확실히 알겠다.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_67.english: Hmm... the moment I felt the most anger...
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_67.korean: 흐음… 내가 가장 분노를 느낀 순간이라…

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_68.english: As for recent times… was it when I heard I couldn't get the money right away from the new wallet? I was quite angry back then.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_68.korean: 최근이라면… 새 지갑한테 돈을 바로 못 받는다고 들었을 때?&n그땐 꽤 화가 났었지.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_69.english: What!? Then… is your belief 'love', Ms. Fnel?
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_69.korean: 네!? 그럼… 에프넬 씨의 신념은 '사랑'인 건가요?

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_7.english: Well? I don't know exactly either. It's just deep inside your soul.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_7.korean: 글쎄? 나도 정확히는 몰라.&n다만 여기는 네 깊고 깊은 내면 속이야.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_70.english: What on earth does it take to come to that conclusion?
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_70.korean: 도대체 무슨 사고 회로를 거쳐야 그런 결론이 나오는 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_71.english: Ahaha, you know the saying "love-hate." Fights happen because we are conscious of each other, too.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_71.korean: 아하하, 애증이라는 말도 있잖아요.&n싸움도 서로가 서로를 의식하기에 일어나는 거고요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_72.english: I can only feel one-sided anger, though.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_73.english: That was just a joke. Please think about it seriously.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_75.english: Still, well, if I were to think about when I was the angriest...
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_75.korean: 그래도 뭐, 언제 가장 분노했는지 생각해 본다면…

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_76.english: When I was abandoned by my parents? … No, I was too young back then and didn't know anything.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_76.korean: 부모에게 버려졌을 때? …아니, 그땐 너무 어려서 아무것도 몰랐어.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_77.english: When I was experimented on and forced to become a Near Soulworker? … No, by then I already had no expectations of humans.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_77.korean: 실험당해 강제로 니어 소울워커가 됐을 때? …아니, 그때쯤엔 이미 인간에게 기대 따윈 없었지.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_78.english: For some reason, I feel like I heard something very dangerous... Is it just my imagination?
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_78.korean: 왠지 굉장히 위험한 얘기를 들은 것 같은데… 기분 탓일까요?

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_79.english: Looking back on it like this… my life was truly no different from that of a corpse.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_79.korean: 이렇게 돌이켜 보면… 진짜 시체나 다름없는 삶이었구나.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_8.english: Is this some kind of byproduct of being forced into experiments...? It feels like I have a tumor of lung cancer inside my body, so I don't really like it.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_8.korean: 강제로 실험당하면서 생겨난 부산물 같은 건가…&n폐암 덩어리 같은 게 몸속에 있는 기분이라 별로 마음에 들진 않네.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_80.english: That's not true. There's no way a corpse could be this warm.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_80.korean: 그렇지 않아요. 이렇게 온기가 있는 시체가 있을 리 없으니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_81.english: Even if it was a corpse, warm blood is now flowing through its cold veins.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_81.korean: 설령 시체였더라도, 지금은 차갑던 혈관에 따뜻한 피가 흐르고 있잖아요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_82.english: … Uh, you were just comforting me, right? Mina, you're surprisingly foul-mouthed. Still, thank you. It was helpful.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_82.korean: …어, 지금 위로해 준 거 맞지? 미나, 너 의외로 입이 좀 험하네.&n그래도 고마워. 덕분에 도움이 됐어.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_83.english: Yes! I'm glad if it was helpful.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_85.english: … It was a time when warm blood flowed…

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_88.english: Wouldn't it be okay to let go now? It seems like it has barely moved for a while...
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_88.korean: 이제 슬슬 놔줘도 괜찮지 않을까요?&n아까부터 거의 움직이지 않게 된 거 같은데…

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_9.english: Well, never mind. Anyway, nice to meet you. Since we're here, do you want to chat a bit?
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_9.korean: 뭐, 됐어. 아무튼 만나서 반갑다. 만난 김에 얘기나 좀 해볼래?

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_90.english: Whoa!? Ullr, are you okay!? Snap out of it!!

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_91.english: A short while later, Efnell came to find me again.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_91.korean: - 잠시 후, 에프넬이 다시 나를 찾아왔다.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_92.english: haven't come up with a clear answer yet... but I think I can reach a conclusion if I think about it a little more.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_92.korean: 명쾌한 답이 나온 건 아니지만…&n조금만 더 고민하면 결론은 낼 수 있을 것 같아.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_93.english: Ugh... Why don't you just go die...

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_94.english: Don't get the wrong idea. Wallet, you just came to see me for personal business.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_94.korean: 착각하지 마.&n지갑 넌 그냥 개인적인 용무가 있어서 찾아온 거니까.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_95.english: Are there any Iron Bugs roaming around nearby?

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_96.english: Good. I'll take care of that guy. I'll handle it for free, so bow your head to the ground and wail in gratitude.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_96.korean: 잘됐네, 그 녀석은 내가 처리하고 올게.&n특별히 공짜로 처리해줄 테니까 땅에 머리 박고 오열하면서 감사하라고.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_97.english: I can just handle everything myself, right? This is my personal business, so don't let the others get involved.
LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_97.korean: 내가 혼자 전부 처리하면 그만이잖아?&n이건 내 개인적인 일이니까, 다른 애들은 끼지 마.

LastCorruptedRecord3-10OP_98.english: It's good that you understand quickly. Well then, I'll be going.

LastCorruptedRecord3-1ED_1.english: Uh... this is your first battle, right? You're fighting too well for that...
LastCorruptedRecord3-1ED_1.korean: 어… 전투는 이번이 처음이지?&n그런 것치곤 너무 잘 싸우는데…

LastCorruptedRecord3-1ED_10.english: I don't want to see someone dying in front of me anymore.
LastCorruptedRecord3-1ED_10.korean: 제 앞에서 누군가가 죽어가는 모습은… 더는 보고 싶지 않아요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-1ED_11.english: I want to save more people than those who have left, so that no more friends will die unjustly...
LastCorruptedRecord3-1ED_11.korean: 억울하게 죽어버린 친구들이 다시는 생기지 않도록…&n떠나간 사람들보다 더 많은 사람들을 구하고 싶어요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-1ED_12.korean: 그러니까… 제가 속죄할 수 있도록 도와주세요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-1ED_14.english: Okay. Dana, I'll accept you as a member of Orca.

LastCorruptedRecord3-1ED_16.english: But, Dana. I hope you don't fight just for the sake of atonement or because you don't want to see someone die.
LastCorruptedRecord3-1ED_16.korean: 하지만, 다나.&n속죄라든가 누군가가 죽는 걸 보고 싶지 않다는 이유만으로는 싸우지 않았으면 좋겠어.

LastCorruptedRecord3-1ED_17.english: If you find the path you will walk, you will become much stronger and be able to save more people.
LastCorruptedRecord3-1ED_17.korean: 자신이 걸어갈 길을 찾는다면, 그때는 훨씬 강해져서 더 많은 사람을 구할 수 있을 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord3-1ED_18.english: … I’m not entirely sure, but right now, I just have a vague desire to help people.
LastCorruptedRecord3-1ED_18.korean: …잘은 모르겠지만, 지금은 그저 막연하게라도 사람들을 돕고 싶다는 생각뿐이에요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-1ED_19.english: There is no need to rush. Dana will surely find her own path someday.
LastCorruptedRecord3-1ED_19.korean: 급할 필요는 없어.&n다나라면 언젠가 반드시 자신만의 길을 찾을 수 있을 테니까.

LastCorruptedRecord3-1ED_2.english: know, right... It's amazing how light my body feels and how I can move as I think.
LastCorruptedRecord3-1ED_2.korean: 그러게요… 몸이 가볍고, 생각하는 대로 움직일 수 있는 게 신기해요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-1ED_21.english: Shall we leave the complicated stuff at that? It got a bit long, but welcome to Orca, Dana.
LastCorruptedRecord3-1ED_21.korean: 복잡한 얘기는 여기까지 할까?&n말이 길어졌지만, 오르카에 온 걸 환영해, 다나.

LastCorruptedRecord3-1ED_22.english: Ah, yes, I will do my best to support you. I look forward to working with you.
LastCorruptedRecord3-1ED_22.korean: 아, 네, 최선을 다해서 지원할게요.&n잘 부탁드립니다.

LastCorruptedRecord3-1ED_3.english: I was worried about whether I would be able to adapt well, but I guess it was unnecessary worry.
LastCorruptedRecord3-1ED_3.korean: 잘 적응할 수 있을까 걱정했는데, 괜한 걱정이었나 보네.

LastCorruptedRecord3-1ED_5.english: Dana? What's wrong? Did you get hurt somewhere?
LastCorruptedRecord3-1ED_5.korean: 다나? 왜 그래? 혹시 어디 다친 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord3-1ED_6.english: … I thought that if I had had this kind of power back then… I could have protected everyone.
LastCorruptedRecord3-1ED_6.korean: …그때도 이런 힘이 있었더라면… 모두를 지킬 수 있었을 거라고 생각했어요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-1ED_7.english: Excuse me, Commander... I have a favor to ask.

LastCorruptedRecord3-1ED_8.english: Could you… accept me as a member of Orca?
LastCorruptedRecord3-1ED_8.korean: 저를… 오르카의 대원으로 받아주실 수 없을까요?

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_10.english: If, just if, I could open my eyes again.
LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_10.korean: 만약, 정말 만약에, 다시 눈을 뜰 수 있게 된다면.

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_11.english: That place is where you can avoid losing someone precious…
LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_11.korean: 그곳은 소중한 사람을 잃지 않을 수 있는…

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_12.english: May it be a kind world…

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_15.english: Did you wake up? Good morning.

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_17.english: I was worried because you hadn't woken up for a long time. How are you feeling? Can you move?
LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_17.korean: 오랫동안 깨어나지 않아서 걱정했어.&n몸은 좀 어때? 움직일 수 있겠어?

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_19.english: For now, would you like to try standing up slowly? It's been a while, so you might not have much strength; don't push yourself too hard.
LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_19.korean: 일단은 천천히 일어나볼래?&n오랜만이라 힘이 안 들어갈 수 있으니 무리는 하지 말고.

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_2.english: However, everyone I trusted disappeared because of me.
LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_2.korean: 하지만, 제가 믿음을 준 사람들은 모두 저 때문에 사라졌어요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_20.english: It's okay, it's a little stiff but I can move.
LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_20.korean: 괜찮아요, 조금 뻐근하지만 움직일 수 있어요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_21.english: That's a relief, then. Good. You probably have a lot of questions, so feel free to ask. I'll answer what I know.
LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_21.korean: 그렇다면 다행이야.&n좋아, 그럼 궁금한 게 많을 테니 편하게 물어봐.&n내가 아는 건 대답해 줄게.

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_23.english: Hmm, right. I have many titles... but would you call me Commander? For one thing, I am the Commander of the Orca Resistance.
LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_23.korean: 음, 그렇네 불리는 호칭이야 많은데… 사령관이라 불러 줄래?&n일단 오르카 저항군의 사령관이거든.

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_24.english: Orca… I’ve never heard of that… Where is this place?
LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_24.korean: 오르카… 처음 들어 보는데… 여긴 어디예요?

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_25.english: Don't worry, it's not the dangerous place you think it is. This is the Orca, inside a submarine.
LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_25.korean: 네가 생각하는 그런 위험한 곳은 아니니까 안심해.&n여긴 오르카호, 잠수함 안이지.

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_26.english: So right now we are deep in the ocean.
LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_26.korean: 그러니까 지금 우리는 바닷속 깊은 곳에 있어.

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_27.english: What!? A submarine? Why would I be in a place like this...

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_28.english: It might be hard to believe, but you were deeply wounded and asleep for a long time.
LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_28.korean: 믿기 힘들겠지만, 넌 큰 상처를 입고 오랫동안 잠들어 있었어.

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_29.english: Come to think of it… to the monsters…

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_3.english: The times when merely breathing was painful have passed…
LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_3.korean: 살아 숨쉬는 것만으로도 고통스럽던 시간들이 지나고…

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_30.english: But you didn't die. Perhaps because your will to live was so strong, you didn't stop breathing until the very end.
LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_30.korean: 하지만 넌 죽지 않았어.&n살고자 하는 의지가 강했기 때문인지 마지막까지 숨을 멈추지 않았지.

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_31.english: I was worried you might never open your eyes again... I'm so glad you woke up like this.
LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_31.korean: 다시는 눈을 뜨지 못할까 봐 걱정했는데… 이렇게 깨어나 줘서 다행이야.

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_33.english: Don't feel too much pressure. It's not a big deal.
LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_33.korean: 너무 부담 갖지 마. 대단한 일도 아니니까.

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_35.english: Hmm, it feels a bit stiff and awkward... You can just call me Oppa comfortably.
LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_35.korean: 음, 뭔가 딱딱한 느낌이 드는 게 영 어색하네...&n그냥 편하게 오빠라고 불러도 돼.

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_36.english: What...? Well, for that... you're my savior... and above all, your age...
LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_36.korean: 네..? 그, 그러기엔… 생명의 은인이시고… 무엇보다 나이가…

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_37.english: I see... I guess I'm not old enough to be called 'Oppa' anymore...
LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_37.korean: 그렇구나… 나는 이제 오빠라고 불릴 나이는 아닌 건가…

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_38.english: Oh, no! That's not what I meant! You're young! Really!
LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_38.korean: 아, 아뇨! 그런 뜻은 아니에요! 젊으세요! 정말로요!

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_39.english: I mean, since you mentioned the term "Commander"... and to become a Commander, you have to graduate from the military academy and do a lot of work... so I just thought that's how it would turn out as I went along...
LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_39.korean: 저는, 그냥 사령관이라고 하셔서…&n사령관이 되려면 사관 학교도 졸업하고 또 많은 일도 해야 하니까… 하다 보면 그렇지 않을까 해서…

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_4.english: I thought that I wanted to become someone that everyone could rely on.
LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_4.korean: 저는 모두에게 의지되는 사람이 되고 싶다는 생각을 했어요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_40.english: I wonder if that is generally how people think?

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_41.english: If you're uncomfortable right now, just call me whatever you're comfortable with. There's no need to feel pressured.
LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_41.korean: 당장은 불편하면 편한 대로 불러줘. 괜히 부담 가질 필요 없어.

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_43.english: Ah… come to think of it, I haven't introduced myself. I am…
LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_43.korean: 아… 그러고 보니 제 소개를 안 했네요. 저는…

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_45.english: Uh, uh... how did you get my name...?

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_46.english: Didn't I tell you? I was treating you while you were asleep. I know at least a basic profile.
LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_46.korean: 말했잖아? 네가 잠들어 있는 동안 치료를 하고 있었다고.&n간단한 프로필 정도는 알고 있어.

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_47.english: Where they lived, what they did for a living, and physical information such as height and weight are also, for now…
LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_47.korean: 어디서 살았는지, 어떤 일을 했는지, 키와 몸무게 같은 신체 정보도 일단은…

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_48.english: Whoa…! It’s okay! I fully understand!

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_49.english: Ah... but just one thing... um... by any chance, did you grow taller while you were asleep?
LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_49.korean: 아… 그래도 한 가지만…&n저… 혹시 잠들어 있는 동안 키가 자랐나요?

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_5.english: I wanted to give back what I had received.

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_51.english: You haven't grown at all... Ahaha...

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_52.english: They say that you can suddenly grow up after becoming an adult, so let's not give up hope.
LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_52.korean: 성인이 된 이후에 갑자기 성장할 수도 있다고 하니까 희망은 버리지 말자.

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_54.english: Anyway, I'm sorry for bringing up a difficult topic when you must be disoriented right after waking up.
LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_54.korean: 아무튼, 막 깨어나서 정신없을 텐데 어려운 얘기를 해서 미안해.

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_55.english: It's hard to believe... but it's okay. I fully understand.
LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_55.korean: 믿기 힘든 이야기지만… 그래도 괜찮아요.&n충분히 이해했어요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_56.english: But… where I had collapsed, the other children…
LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_56.korean: 그런데… 제가 쓰러져 있던 곳에 다른 아이들은…

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_57.english: … I'm sorry. There's nothing I can say.
LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_57.korean: …미안. 내가 해줄 수 있는 말이 없어.

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_58.english: It might be tough, but I hope you stay strong for now.
LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_58.korean: 힘들겠지만, 지금은 마음을 굳게 가졌으면 해.

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_60.english: Have you calmed down a little?

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_62.english: You don't need to apologize. It's not your fault that you lost your friends.
LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_62.korean: 죄송할 필요 없어.&n친구들을 잃은 게 네 잘못은 아니니까.

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_64.english: Because I was weak... If I had the strength to protect everyone, this wouldn't have happened.
LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_64.korean: 제가 약했으니까… 모두를 지킬 힘이 있었더라면 이런 일은 없었을 거예요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_65.english: … So, I want to have power.

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_67.english: What? You say you're going... where?

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_68.english: It's stifling staying in the hospital room all the time, isn't it?

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_69.english: Moving around from now on will be good rehabilitation.
LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_69.korean: 지금부터 움직이는 게 좋은 재활이 될 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_7.english: By the time I realized that it was just my own greed, it was already too late.
LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_7.korean: 그게, 저 혼자만의 욕심이었다는 걸 깨달았을 땐, 이미 늦었고.

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_71.english: It is a training facility used by Orca's members.

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_73.english: Hey, what on earth is the Orca? With submarines and facilities like this, it doesn't seem like an ordinary military unit.
LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_73.korean: 저기, 오르카는 대체 뭘 하는 곳인가요?&n잠수함도 그렇고 이런 시설까지 갖추고 있다니, 보통 군대는 아닌 것 같아요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_74.english: Does Dana remember the monster that attacked her?

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_75.english: Yes… it still comes back to me vividly when I close my eyes.
LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_75.korean: 네… 아직도 눈을 감으면 선명히 떠올라요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_76.english: That monster is an 'Iron Bug'. It is a being that suddenly appears, destroys the world, and threatens humanity.
LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_76.korean: 그 괴물은 ‘철충’. 갑자기 나타나 세상을 멸망시키고 인류를 위협하는 존재야.

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_77.english: Our Orca is doing the work of defeating such monsters and saving the survivors.
LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_77.korean: 우리 오르카는 그런 괴물을 쓰러뜨리고, 살아남은 사람들을 구하는 일을 하고 있어.

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_79.english: You said earlier that you wanted power, right?

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_8.korean: 이젠 돌이킬 수 없는 일이 되어버렸어요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_80.english: In that case, you probably won't need my help anymore.
LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_80.korean: 그렇다면 이미 내 도움은 필요 없을 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_82.english: To wake you up after you were severely injured and lost consciousness, I had no choice but to amplify the soul energy flowing within your body and forcibly activate your physical activity.
LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_82.korean: 심한 상처를 입고 정신을 잃은 너를 깨우기 위해,&n네 몸속에 흐르는 소울 에너지를 증폭시켜 강제로 신체 활동을 활성화시킬 수밖에 없었어.

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_84.english: If things go according to my plan… you would have already become a person with supernatural abilities.
LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_84.korean: 내 예상대로라면… 넌 이미 이능력자가 됐을 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_86.english: But no matter how strong you are, it's useless if you can't handle it, right? So, how about we do a simple test to warm up?
LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_86.korean: 하지만, 아무리 힘이 있어도 다루지 못하면 아무 소용 없겠지?&n그러니 몸풀기 겸 간단한 테스트를 해보는 게 어때?

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_87.english: If you mean a test... at this training facility?

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_88.english: Yeah. It's going to be training similar to the real thing. You could get hurt, so are you sure that's okay?
LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_88.korean: 그래. 실전과 비슷한 훈련이 될 거야.&n다칠 수도 있는데 괜찮겠어?

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_89.english: Yes. Now that you have power, you have no other choice.
LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_89.korean: 네. 힘을 가지게 됐으니 다른 선택지는 없잖아요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_90.english: ... So you have no intention of running away from the start.

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_91.english: Because I’ve realized now that I can’t protect anyone by running away.
LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_91.korean: 도망쳐선 아무도 지킬 수 없다는 걸… 이제는 알아버렸으니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-1OP_92.english: Okay. Then let's start the training.

LastCorruptedRecord3-2ED_12.english: Why are you being so nice to me?
LastCorruptedRecord3-2ED_12.korean: 어째서 저한테 이렇게까지 잘해 주시는 건가요?

LastCorruptedRecord3-2ED_13.english: I… am not a child worthy of such undeserved kindness.
LastCorruptedRecord3-2ED_13.korean: 저는… 이런 과분한 호의를 받을 만한 아이가 아니에요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-2ED_14.english: I know what Dana did in the past.
LastCorruptedRecord3-2ED_14.korean: 나는 다나가 이전에 어떤 행동들을 했는지 알고 있어.

LastCorruptedRecord3-2ED_15.english: You traveled around conflict zones and took in and cared for children in similar circumstances to yourself, didn't you?
LastCorruptedRecord3-2ED_15.korean: 분쟁 지역을 돌아다니면서 자신과 비슷한 처지의 아이들을 거둬 돌봐주었잖아?

LastCorruptedRecord3-2ED_16.english: That is a tremendous undertaking that even adults would hesitate to step forward for.
LastCorruptedRecord3-2ED_16.korean: 그건 어른들도 선뜻 나서지 못할 대단한 일이야.

LastCorruptedRecord3-2ED_17.english: Why did Dana look after the children?

LastCorruptedRecord3-2ED_18.english: I didn't want those children to feel the despair of having nowhere to turn... That's all.
LastCorruptedRecord3-2ED_18.korean: 의지할 곳이 없을 때의 절망을… 그 아이들에게 느끼게 하고 싶지 않았어요.&n그뿐이에요…

LastCorruptedRecord3-2ED_19.english: Yeah, I feel the same way.

LastCorruptedRecord3-2ED_2.english: Welcome back. I'm glad you returned safely. You must be very tired, so get some rest first.
LastCorruptedRecord3-2ED_2.korean: 어서 와. 무사히 돌아와서 다행이야.&n많이 지쳤을 테니 우선은 조금 쉬어.

LastCorruptedRecord3-2ED_21.english: You've been a pillar of support for many children until now, but Dana didn't really have anyone to lean on, did she?
LastCorruptedRecord3-2ED_21.korean: 지금까지 넌 많은 아이들의 버팀목이 되어줬지만, 정작 다나에게는 기댈 수 있는 누군가가 없었잖아?

LastCorruptedRecord3-2ED_22.english: So now, wouldn't it be nice to have at least one person by your side you can lean on?
LastCorruptedRecord3-2ED_22.korean: 그러니 이제는, 네가 기댈 수 있는 누군가가 한 명쯤 곁에 있어도 되지 않을까?

LastCorruptedRecord3-2ED_24.english: You're so skilled... I heard to be wary of men who are good with words...

LastCorruptedRecord3-2ED_25.english: Huh...? I thought I just said something super cool...
LastCorruptedRecord3-2ED_25.korean: 어라…?&n지금 뭔가 엄청 멋진 대사를 했다고 생각했는데…

LastCorruptedRecord3-2ED_27.english: It still feels awkward, though. Me leaning on someone...

LastCorruptedRecord3-2ED_28.english: People who are used to only giving aren't very good at receiving. It took me a long time to get used to it, too.
LastCorruptedRecord3-2ED_28.korean: 원래 주기만 하던 사람은 받는 걸 잘 못하거든.&n나도 익숙해지는 데 오래 걸렸어.

LastCorruptedRecord3-2ED_29.english: So you don't have to worry too much. I just want you to know that Dana deserves it, and that I will always be with you.
LastCorruptedRecord3-2ED_29.korean: 그러니까 깊게 고민하지 않아도 돼.&n그저 다나는 그럴 자격이 있고, 나는 언제나 너와 함께할 거란 걸 알아줬으면 좋겠어.

LastCorruptedRecord3-2ED_30.english: I won't leave Dana alone anymore.
LastCorruptedRecord3-2ED_30.korean: 앞으로 다나를 혼자 두지 하지 않을 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord3-2ED_32.english: I also… if possible, I would like to be with the Commander for a long time.
LastCorruptedRecord3-2ED_32.korean: 저도… 가능하다면, 사령관님과 오래도록 함께 있고 싶어요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-2ED_4.english: It's just... thinking that these monsters might be harming people in other places too, I felt a sense of urgency...
LastCorruptedRecord3-2ED_4.korean: 그저… 다른 곳에서도 이런 괴물들이 사람들을 해치고 있을 거라 생각하니, 마음이 급해져서…

LastCorruptedRecord3-2ED_5.english: Dana, there is no need to blame yourself for things that haven't happened.
LastCorruptedRecord3-2ED_5.korean: 다나, 일어나지 않은 일로 스스로를 몰아붙일 필요는 없어.

LastCorruptedRecord3-2ED_6.english: On flat ground, even if you fall once, you can get back up.
LastCorruptedRecord3-2ED_6.korean: 평지에서라면 한 번 넘어져도 다시 일어날 수 있어.

LastCorruptedRecord3-2ED_7.english: However, if a person driven to the edge of a cliff falls... they eventually plummet.
LastCorruptedRecord3-2ED_7.korean: 하지만, 낭떠러지까지 몰린 사람이 넘어지면... 결국 추락하고 말아.

LastCorruptedRecord3-2ED_8.english: So, isn't now the time to focus on what you can do?
LastCorruptedRecord3-2ED_8.korean: 그러니 지금은 네가 할 수 있는 일에 집중할 때가 아닐까?

LastCorruptedRecord3-2ED_9.english: Once Dana sorts out what she can do, I'll help her too.
LastCorruptedRecord3-2ED_9.korean: 다나가 무엇을 할 수 있는지 생각을 정리하면, 나도 도와줄게.

LastCorruptedRecord3-2MD_1.english: [c][00FF00][All nearby Iron Bug reactions have disappeared.][-][/c]

LastCorruptedRecord3-2MD_10.english: [c][00FF00][You can hold your head high. You did something praiseworthy. You did a great job, Dana.][-][/c]
LastCorruptedRecord3-2MD_10.korean: [c][00FF00][가슴 펴도 돼. 너는 칭찬받을 일을 했어.&n정말 잘했어, 다나.][-][/c]

LastCorruptedRecord3-2MD_11.english: Hehehe... Maybe it's because I'm not used to being praised... but I feel a bit shy.
LastCorruptedRecord3-2MD_11.korean: 에헤헤… 칭찬받는 게 익숙하지 않아서 그런지… 쑥스럽네요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-2MD_12.english: [c][00FF00][In that case, I'll praise you often until you get used to it.][-][/c]

LastCorruptedRecord3-2MD_13.english: What!? Often from now on...? That's...

LastCorruptedRecord3-2MD_15.english: No! That's not it! On the contrary… I'm really happy when I get praised by the Commander.
LastCorruptedRecord3-2MD_15.korean: 아뇨! 그런 건 아니에요!&n오히려… 사령관님께 칭찬받으면 정말 기뻐요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-2MD_16.english: However, if I feel this way every time… I don’t think I’ll be able to endure it…
LastCorruptedRecord3-2MD_16.korean: 다만, 매번 이런 기분이라면… 제가 버티질 못할 것 같아서요…

LastCorruptedRecord3-2MD_17.english: Um, then! Just in case, I'll go look around a bit more and be right back!
LastCorruptedRecord3-2MD_17.korean: 저, 저는 그럼! 혹시 모르니까 더 둘러보고 올게요!

LastCorruptedRecord3-2MD_2.english: [c][00FF00][It’s impressive that you finished clearing the area all by yourself, but isn’t that a bit too much?][-][/c]
LastCorruptedRecord3-2MD_2.korean: [c][00FF00][혼자서 구역 정리까지 끝내다니 대단한데, 너무 무리한 건 아니야?][-][/c]

LastCorruptedRecord3-2MD_3.english: I thought the surest way to protect something precious is… to eliminate the source of the threat.
LastCorruptedRecord3-2MD_3.korean: 소중한 걸 지키는 가장 확실한 방법은… 위협의 근원을 없애는 거라고 생각했어요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-2MD_7.english: Um... did I really save people?

LastCorruptedRecord3-2MD_8.english: [c][00FF00][Of course. Of course. Dana definitely protected the people.][-][/c]

LastCorruptedRecord3-2MD_9.english: [c][00FF00][If you hadn't defeated the Iron Bug, there would have been significant damage to the people nearby.][-][/c]
LastCorruptedRecord3-2MD_9.korean: [c][00FF00][네가 철충을 쓰러뜨리지 않았다면 근처 사람들에게 큰 피해가 있었을 거야.][-][/c]

LastCorruptedRecord3-2OP_1.english: Dana, are you okay? You seem quite nervous.
LastCorruptedRecord3-2OP_1.korean: 다나, 괜찮아?&n상당히 긴장하고 있는 것 같은데.

LastCorruptedRecord3-2OP_10.english: Besides, there is a small village nearby where people live. If the report is true, we need to handle it immediately.
LastCorruptedRecord3-2OP_10.korean: 게다가 그 근처엔 사람들이 살고 있는 작은 마을도 있지.&n만약 보고가 사실이라면, 서둘러 처리해야 해.

LastCorruptedRecord3-2OP_11.english: Then my mission is… to verify if there really are Iron Bugs.
LastCorruptedRecord3-2OP_11.korean: 그렇다면 제 임무는… 철충이 정말로 있는지 확인하는 거군요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-2OP_13.english: Um... then, if there really are Iron Bugs... what should I do?
LastCorruptedRecord3-2OP_13.korean: 저기... 그럼 만약 정말로 철충이 있다면… 전 어떻게 해야 하나요?

LastCorruptedRecord3-2OP_14.english: Dana's mission is strictly reconnaissance, but depending on the situation, it could turn into combat.
LastCorruptedRecord3-2OP_14.korean: 다나의 임무는 어디까지나 정찰이지만, 상황에 따라서는 전투가 될 수도 있어.

LastCorruptedRecord3-2OP_15.english: There is no need to worry too much. The Iron Bug in this area are all weak individuals.
LastCorruptedRecord3-2OP_15.korean: 크게 걱정할 필요는 없어. 이 지역의 철충은 약한 개체뿐이니까.

LastCorruptedRecord3-2OP_16.english: If it's Dana, she'll be able to handle it sufficiently.
LastCorruptedRecord3-2OP_16.korean: 다나라면 충분히 상대할 수 있을 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord3-2OP_18.english: I'm sorry. I wouldn't normally send you alone. Orca is currently short-handed due to some circumstances.
LastCorruptedRecord3-2OP_18.korean: 미안해, 원래라면 혼자 보내지 않을 텐데.&n지금 오르카는 사정이 있어서 일손이 좀 부족한 상황이거든.

LastCorruptedRecord3-2OP_19.english: It looks like a smaller unit than I thought?

LastCorruptedRecord3-2OP_2.english: I-I'm fine! It's true that I'm nervous... but I'm okay!
LastCorruptedRecord3-2OP_2.korean: 괜, 괜찮아요!&n긴장하고 있는 건 사실이지만… 그래도 괜찮아요!

LastCorruptedRecord3-2OP_21.english: Still, I can't just not provide any support. First, take this.
LastCorruptedRecord3-2OP_21.korean: 그래도 아무 지원도 안 해줄 순 없지.&n우선, 이걸 받아.

LastCorruptedRecord3-2OP_23.english: I will be briefing and commanding the upcoming operations through this drone. Rest assured, we can share the situation in real time.
LastCorruptedRecord3-2OP_23.korean: 앞으로의 작전은 이 드론을 통해 내가 브리핑과 지휘를 해줄 거야.&n실시간으로 상황을 공유할 수 있으니 안심해.

LastCorruptedRecord3-2OP_24.english: Yes, just being able to hear the Commander's voice during a mission makes me feel reassured.
LastCorruptedRecord3-2OP_24.korean: 네, 임무 중에 사령관님의 목소리를 들을 수만 있어도 마음이 든든해요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-2OP_26.english: Commander, we have arrived at the objective point.

LastCorruptedRecord3-2OP_27.english: And this signal... could it be...

LastCorruptedRecord3-2OP_28.english: [c][00FF00][This reaction… It looks like the reports of Iron Bug were true after all. It’s certain that there are Iron Bug nearby.][-][/c]
LastCorruptedRecord3-2OP_28.korean: [c][00FF00][이 반응… 아무래도 철충이 있다는 보고는 사실이었나 보네.&n주변에 철충이 있는 게 확실해.][-][/c]

LastCorruptedRecord3-2OP_29.english: [c][00FF00][Dana, can you do this? I told you it was reconnaissance, but I'm sorry to assign you combat on your very first mission.][-][/c]
LastCorruptedRecord3-2OP_29.korean: [c][00FF00][다나 할 수 있겠어?&n정찰이라 했는데 첫 임무부터 전투를 맡기게 되어서 미안해.][-][/c]

LastCorruptedRecord3-2OP_3.english: Even though it's your first mission, there's no need to be that nervous.
LastCorruptedRecord3-2OP_3.korean: 아무리 첫 임무라지만 그렇게까지 긴장할 필요는 없어.

LastCorruptedRecord3-2OP_30.english: It's okay! I can do it! Leave it to me!

LastCorruptedRecord3-2OP_31.english: Those things… with my own hands…!

LastCorruptedRecord3-2OP_4.english: This mission is just a reconnaissance.

LastCorruptedRecord3-2OP_6.english: Ah, but since there isn't absolutely no chance of encountering Iron Bugs, maybe it's better to stay alert?
LastCorruptedRecord3-2OP_6.korean: 아, 그래도 철충과 조우할 가능성이 아예 없는 건 아니니까 역시 긴장하는 게 좋을 지도?

LastCorruptedRecord3-2OP_8.english: Haha, sorry. I went too far with the joke. Well then, I'll explain the mission details.
LastCorruptedRecord3-2OP_8.korean: 하하, 미안. 장난이 심했지.&n그럼 임무 내용을 설명할게.

LastCorruptedRecord3-2OP_9.english: There are reports that traces of Iron Bug (Iron Bugs) have been detected near the area marked on the coordinates.
LastCorruptedRecord3-2OP_9.korean: 좌표에 표시된 지역 부근에서 철충의 흔적이 포착되었다는 보고가 있어.

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_10.english: There are no qualifications required to make friends. As long as your hearts match, that’s what makes a friend, isn’t it?
LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_10.korean: 친구를 사귀는데 자격 같은 건 없어.&n서로 마음만 맞는다면 그게 친구잖아?

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_101.english: Preferences? There are tons of kids in Orca who call you "Master," you know?
LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_101.korean: 취향? 오르카에서 주인님이라고 부르는 애들 엄청 많은데?

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_103.english: Ah, welcome back. Did you have a good chat?
LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_103.korean: 아, 어서 와.&n얘기는 잘 나누고 왔어?

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_104.english: Yes, I think I will be able to get along well with both of you in the future.
LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_104.korean: 네, 두 분하고는 앞으로 사이좋게 지낼 수 있을 것 같아요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_106.english: Hey, Dana? I feel like I'm getting a bit of a stare...
LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_106.korean: 저기, 다나?&n뭔가 좀 시선이 따가운 것 같은데…?

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_107.english: I just heard a little bit about what kind of person the commander is.
LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_107.korean: 그냥 사령관님이 어떤 분인지 얘기를 조금 들었어요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_108.english: Uh... yeah... my reputation isn't bad, right...? I thought I'd lived a pretty good life...
LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_108.korean: 어… 응… 내 평판이 나쁘진 않지…?&n나름 착하게 살았다고 생각하는데…

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_109.english: I thought you were a good person... I never imagined you would be doing such things to your team members...
LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_109.korean: 좋은 분이라 생각했는데…&n설마, 대원들에게 그런 짓을 하고 계실 줄은…

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_110.english: Wait, I don't know what you're misunderstanding, but—
LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_110.korean: 잠깐, 무슨 오해를 하고 있는지 모르겠지만ㅡ

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_111.english: Emergency! A massive horde of Iron Bug (Iron Bugs) is attempting to breach the defensive lines in the planned operation area, resulting in soldiers becoming isolated one after another! Requesting immediate support from Orca!
LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_111.korean: 긴급 사태 발생! 현재 작전 예정 지역에서 대량의 철충이 방어선 침투를 시도,&n병사들이 고립되는 상황이 속출 중!&n이에 오르카에 신속한 지원을 요청!

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_113.english: ...It seems there isn't enough time to leisurely clear up the misunderstanding.
LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_113.korean: ...아무래도 느긋하게 오해를 풀 시간은 없는 것 같네.

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_12.english: But… they aren’t bad people, are they…?

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_13.english: Saying things like 'Aah~?' or 'I'll kill you~?' or 'That's hilarious!'
LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_13.korean: 아앙~?' 이라던가…&n'죽여버린다~?' 라던가…&n'완전 웃겨!' 라고 말한다거나…

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_14.english: Uh... it's not that there aren't any kids like that...
LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_14.korean: 어… 그런 애들이 없는 건 아닌데...

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_15.english: It's okay, it's okay! It's not at all, so don't worry and go ahead.
LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_15.korean: 괜찮아, 괜찮아! 전혀 아니니까 걱정말고 다녀와.

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_16.english: On the contrary, because they are cute kids like you.

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_17.english: Ah... um... then, I'll be going now...!

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_2.english: Is it a mission again today?

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_20.english: They told me I was cute…

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_21.english: So it's you? The little kid Master was talking about.

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_22.english: … Commander, it’s not cute at all.

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_23.english: Uh… why are you glaring at me so menacingly…?
LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_23.korean: 어… 왜 그렇게 무섭게 째려보는 거야…?

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_24.english: … I apologize for asking this on our first meeting, but… by any chance, how old are you…?

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_26.english: I have way more than that, and I'm not a little kid.
LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_26.korean: 전, 그것보다 훨~씬 많고, 꼬맹이가 아니에요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_27.english: It's just that I'm! a! little! short. Please be careful.
LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_27.korean: 그냥, 키가! 조금! 작을! 뿐이에요.&n주의해, 주세요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_28.english: To others, they both look like little kids…

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_29.english: … Hah, what did I say… Ugh, this is all Gamma's fault!
LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_29.korean: …핫, 내가 무슨 말을…&n우씨, 이게 다 감마 님 때문이야!

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_3.english: Yeah. Now that Dana has gotten quite used to it, I’m planning to give her a bigger mission this time.
LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_3.korean: 응. 이제 다나도 제법 익숙해졌으니까 이번에는 좀 큰 임무를 맡겨보려 해.

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_32.english: My name is Merope. I am the youngest of the Pleiades in the Guardian series. I came here to carry out a mission with you today. Nice to meet you.
LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_32.korean: 내 이름은 메로페.&n가디언 시리즈로 플레이아데스의 막내야.&n오늘은 같이 임무를 하러 왔어. 잘 부탁해.

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_34.english: Um... by the way, what kind of missions do you do in Orca? You're much younger than me...
LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_34.korean: 저… 근데 오르카에서 무슨 임무를 하시나요?&n저 보다 훨씬 어리신데…

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_35.english: I used to serve as a staff officer for the fleet.

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_36.english: Fleet Staff!? Is that really okay!?

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_37.english: Of course it's fine! What do you think of me!

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_38.english: I gave up my spot for now because that idiot canned guy was originally supposed to take the role, but I am by far more skilled!
LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_38.korean: 지금은 바보 통조림 녀석이 원래 맡아야 하는 역할이라서 자리를 양보했지만,&n실력은 어디까지나 내가 더 뛰어나니까!

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_4.english: And I think it's about time I started talking to the other members as well.
LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_4.korean: 그리고 슬슬 다른 대원들과도 대화가 필요할 것 같아.

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_40.english: There is, a guy like that.

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_41.english: Mr. Merope is amazing. To think she served as a staff officer leading a fleet.
LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_41.korean: 메로페 씨는 굉장하네요.&n함대를 이끄는 참모를 했었다니.

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_42.english: Meropero is fine. Everyone calls it that.

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_43.english: Ah, then please feel free to call me by my name as well.
LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_43.korean: 아, 그럼 저도 편하게 이름으로 불러주세요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_44.english: It's fine as long as you don't call me 'little kid'.

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_45.english: Ah, yeah... Looks like you've had a hard time too...

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_46.english: Ahaha, that's unusual. There are even people who get intimidated by our cute youngest.
LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_46.korean: 아하하, 별일이네? 우리 귀염둥이 막내가 주눅드는 사람도 있고.

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_48.english: Alcyone, if you suddenly appear, it'll surprise me.

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_49.english: Sorry, sorry, I was wondering how long I would have to wait. So, let me introduce myself now!
LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_49.korean: 미안, 미안 언제까지 기다려야 하나 싶었거든.&n그럼 이번에는 내 소개를 할게!

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_50.english: I'm Alcyone! Feel free to call me by my name too! I'm the third of the seven Pleiades sisters from the Guardian series.
LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_50.korean: 나는 알키오네! 나도 편하게 이름으로 불러줘!&n가디언 시리즈로 플레이아데스 일곱 자매 중 셋째야.

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_51.english: It is my duty to protect my master and everyone!
LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_51.korean: 주인님과 모두를 지키는 게 내 임무지!

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_52.english: Commander... I'm sure they were cute kids...

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_55.english: Thanks! You need to be big to protect everyone. And you're cute because you look just like our adorable youngest!
LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_55.korean: 고마워! 모두를 지키기 위해서는 몸이 커야 하거든.&n그러는 넌 우리 귀여운 막내랑 닮아서 귀여워!

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_57.english: Ugh... Why does everyone only look at height...
LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_57.korean: 우으… 어째서 모두 키만 보는 걸까요…

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_58.english: Anyway, the fact that you came looking for us means you're Dana, right?
LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_58.korean: 아무튼, 우리를 찾아왔다는 건 네가 다나 맞지?

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_59.english: Yes, the commander told me to go talk to you all.
LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_59.korean: 네, 사령관님이 여러분들하고 애기하고 오라고 하셨어요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_6.english: Yeah, I'm going on today's mission with another Orca member.
LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_6.korean: 그래, 오늘 임무는 다른 오르카 대원과 함께 나갈 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_60.english: Great! Is there anything you want to ask us? Feel free to ask anything!
LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_60.korean: 좋아! 우리에게 물어보고 싶은 게 있어?&n뭐든 물어봐도 괜찮아!

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_62.english: Alcyone, if you suddenly approach her like that, she gets scared. I'm used to it so I'm fine, but it's actually kind of scary.
LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_62.korean: 알키오네 언니, 갑자기 그렇게 다가가면 무서워 하잖아.&n나는 익숙해서 괜찮지만, 그거 은근히 무섭다고.

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_63.english: What's wrong, Merope? Are you jealous?

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_64.english: Hahaha, my cute little sister! Even your jealousy is cute! Don't worry! This big sister thinks our Merope is the cutest!
LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_64.korean: 후후후, 귀여운 내 동생! 질투하는 것도 귀엽구나!&n걱정 마! 이 언닌 우리 메로페가 최고로 귀엽다고 생각하고 있으니까!

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_65.english: Ugh... I told you it's hard when you cling to me like that!
LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_65.korean: 우으… 그러니~까~ 언니가 그렇게 달라붙으면 힘들다니까~!

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_66.english: Excuse me... I heard that Alcyone works to protect everyone.
LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_66.korean: 저기... 알키오네 언니는 모두를 지키는 일을 하신다고 들었는데요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_67.english: That's right! I protect everyone with this big shield. Although sometimes I ride a surfboard too!
LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_67.korean: 맞아! 이 커다란 방패로 모두를 지키고 있어.&n가끔은 서핑 보드를 탈 때도 있지만!

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_69.english: Hmm... in my case, it was made that way from the beginning... but that wouldn't be a valid answer, would it?
LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_69.korean: 음~ 나 같은 경우에는 처음부터 그렇게 만들어졌으니까…인데, 그렇게 말하면 대답이 안 되겠지?

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_7.english: They'll probably be waiting in the lobby. It wouldn't hurt to get to know them, so why don't you go talk to them?
LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_7.korean: 로비에서 기다리고 있을 텐데, 친해져서 나쁠 건 없으니 한번 얘기하고 오는 게 어때?

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_70.english: The reason I protect everyone is… because I like them?

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_72.english: Of course, Master, and our adorable youngest Merope, Princess Mel, Siasia, Empi, Galatea, and all the other members.
LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_72.korean: 주인님은 물론이고 우리 귀염둥이 막내 메로페, 멜 공주, 시아시아, 엠피, 갈라테아 그리고 다른 대원들 전부.

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_73.english: Because I like you, and because I don't want to lose you... isn't that why I protect you?
LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_73.korean: 좋아하니까, 잃고 싶지 않으니까... 지키는 게 아닐까?

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_74.english: Sorry for the vague answer. Honestly, I’ve always taken it for granted, so I’ve never really thought about it deeply.
LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_74.korean: 애매한 대답이라 미안, 솔직히 지금까지 당연한 일이라고 여겨와서 깊게 생각해 본 적 없어.

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_76.english: Sister Alcyone… did you lose someone precious to you too?

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_78.english: Oh, I'm sorry! Asking such a sensitive question all of a sudden...

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_79.english: Yeah, I lost it. And a lot of it.

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_8.english: You know, maybe we could become new friends?

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_80.english: However, I don't think that if I had more power back then... or if I had made a different choice, I might have been able to protect it...
LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_80.korean: 하지만, 그때 나에게 더 힘이 있었으면... 이라던가,&n다른 선택을 했다면 지킬 수 있지 않았을까... 라고 생각하진 않아.

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_82.english: Of course, I have thought that way before, and if you ask if I still don't feel that way at all, I do feel a bit guilty, but I still want to say that I don't right now.
LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_82.korean: 물론, 그렇게 생각한 적이 있고 지금도 전혀 아니냐고 물으면 좀 찔리긴 하는데,&n그래도 지금은 아니라고 말하고 싶어.

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_85.english: Huh? Alcyone? Why are you looking at me?
LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_85.korean: 응? 알키오네 언니? 왜 날 봐?

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_86.english: Because I know very well who I need to protect right now.
LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_86.korean: 지금 내가 지켜야할 대상이 누군지 잘 알고 있으니까.

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_87.english: Rather than regretting the past, I want to focus on the things I can protect now.
LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_87.korean: 과거의 일을 후회할 바에는 지금 내가 지킬 수 있는 것들에 집중하고 싶어.

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_88.english: … I also want to protect people like Alcyone.

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_89.english: Will I be able to do well?

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_9.english: Friend… As for me, the right to make friends now…
LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_9.korean: 친구… 저에게 이제 친구를 사귈 자격 같은 건…

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_91.english: Thank you. Until just a moment ago, everything felt so bleak, like there was a thick fog in front of me... but now I think I can see a little bit ahead.
LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_91.korean: 고맙습니다. 조금 전까진 눈앞에 안개 낀 것처럼 막막했는데…&n지금은 앞이 조금 보이는 것 같아요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_92.english: Hehehe, really? Then that's a relief!

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_93.english: And lastly, something has been bothering me for a while...

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_95.english: You two keep referring to him as "Master." Who are you talking about? Are you perhaps employed by someone?
LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_95.korean: 두 분이서 주인님이라고 계속 말씀하시는데 누구를 말하는 건가요?&n혹시 누군가에게 고용된 건가요?

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_96.english: Huh? You are the Master, though? Right, Meropé?

LastCorruptedRecord3-3ED_98.english: …Surely you aren't talking about the Commander…?

LastCorruptedRecord3-4ED_1.english: I'm glad everyone returned safely. None of the rescued soldiers were seriously injured either.
LastCorruptedRecord3-4ED_1.korean: 모두 무사히 돌아와서 다행이야.&n구출한 병사들도 전원 크게 다치지 않았어.

LastCorruptedRecord3-4ED_10.english: It's okay. I'm not angry. So you don't have to hang your head like that.
LastCorruptedRecord3-4ED_10.korean: 괜찮아. 화 안 났어.&n그러니까 그렇게 고개 숙이지 않아도 돼.

LastCorruptedRecord3-4ED_12.english: Well, it's true that I was very worried, though.
LastCorruptedRecord3-4ED_12.korean: 뭐, 걱정 많이 한 건 사실이지만.

LastCorruptedRecord3-4ED_14.english: But, it’s not like Dana did anything wrong, right?
LastCorruptedRecord3-4ED_14.korean: 근데, 다나가 꼭 잘못한 건 아니잖아?

LastCorruptedRecord3-4ED_15.english: Going to help without looking back, out of a desire to help even a little bit because you were worried about the people, is something that deserves praise.
LastCorruptedRecord3-4ED_15.korean: 사람들이 걱정돼서 조금이라도 돕고 싶다는 마음에,&n뒤도 돌아보지 않고 도와주러 간 행동은 칭찬받아 마땅한 일이야.

LastCorruptedRecord3-4ED_16.english: So lift your head. You did a great job, Dana.

LastCorruptedRecord3-4ED_17.english: No... I think I made a big mistake toward the Commander.
LastCorruptedRecord3-4ED_17.korean: 아니에요… 저는 사령관님께 큰 잘못을 저질렀다고 생각해요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-4ED_18.english: I only thought that I absolutely had to help the people I have met so far.
LastCorruptedRecord3-4ED_18.korean: 저는 지금까지 만난 분들을 반드시 도와야 한다고만 생각했어요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-4ED_19.english: Lost children, people with disabilities, and even those who guided me…
LastCorruptedRecord3-4ED_19.korean: 길 잃은 아이들, 몸이 불편한 분들, 저를 이끌어주셨던 분들까지…

LastCorruptedRecord3-4ED_20.english: To fill the needs of those who are lacking, and to repay the kindness of those who guided me…
LastCorruptedRecord3-4ED_20.korean: 부족한 사람에겐 그것을 채워드리기 위해, 저를 이끌어준 사람에겐 은혜를 갚기 위해…

LastCorruptedRecord3-4ED_21.english: So, for me, it was always only worry about other people.
LastCorruptedRecord3-4ED_21.korean: 그래서 제겐, 언제나 다른 분들에 대한 걱정 뿐이었어요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-4ED_22.english: But… the fact that they were thinking of me just as much as I was worried about them…
LastCorruptedRecord3-4ED_22.korean: 하지만… 제가 그분들을 걱정하는 만큼, 그분들도 저를 생각해주시고 있었다는 걸…

LastCorruptedRecord3-4ED_23.english: I didn't know until everyone told me. … I probably hadn't even thought about it.
LastCorruptedRecord3-4ED_23.korean: 모두가 말씀해 주시기 전까진 알지 못했어요.&n…아마 생각도 하지 않았던 거겠죠.

LastCorruptedRecord3-4ED_24.english: So, I have to apologize to the Commander. Because I… hated myself for receiving so much concern from so many people.
LastCorruptedRecord3-4ED_24.korean: 그러니까, 저는 사령관님께 사과드려야 해요.&n저는… 그렇게 많은 분들의 걱정을 받은 제 자신을, 미워했으니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-4ED_25.english: In that case, aren't there other people who should apologize besides me?
LastCorruptedRecord3-4ED_25.korean: 그렇다면 나 말고도 사과해야 할 사람이 있지 않아?

LastCorruptedRecord3-4ED_26.english: Ah…! I’m really sorry to Alcyone and Merope too…!
LastCorruptedRecord3-4ED_26.korean: 아…! 알키오네 언니랑 메로페에게도 정말 죄송해요…!

LastCorruptedRecord3-4ED_27.english: It's okay, it happens! You did it because you wanted to protect everyone, right?
LastCorruptedRecord3-4ED_27.korean: 괜찮아, 그럴 수도 있지!&n모두를 지키고 싶어서 한 행동이잖아?

LastCorruptedRecord3-4ED_28.english: … I also started looking back at my old self again.

LastCorruptedRecord3-4ED_29.english: Hmm... but since he admitted he was wrong, he should be punished for making everyone suffer, shouldn't he?
LastCorruptedRecord3-4ED_29.korean: 흐음… 그래도 잘못했다고 했으니, 모두를 고생시킨 벌은 받아야겠는데?

LastCorruptedRecord3-4ED_3.english: ...Do you feel a little better after crying?

LastCorruptedRecord3-4ED_30.english: Okay. From now on, you will call me 'Oppa'. That's all.
LastCorruptedRecord3-4ED_30.korean: 좋아. 지금부터 나에 대한 호칭을 ‘오빠’로 고정. 이상.

LastCorruptedRecord3-4ED_31.english: … Yes, from now on, no matter what happens, I will definitely—Brother—Eek?!
LastCorruptedRecord3-4ED_31.korean: …네, 앞으로는 무슨 일이 있어도 반드시 오빠—에엑?!

LastCorruptedRecord3-4ED_32.english: Ah, no, wait! That's cheating, Commander... O... Oppa!?
LastCorruptedRecord3-4ED_32.korean: 아, 아니, 잠깐만요! 이런 건 반칙이에요, 사령… 오… 오빠!?

LastCorruptedRecord3-4ED_33.english: Hehe, isn't it better this way because it makes us look closer? Or do you want to keep your distance from me? That's a bit disappointing...
LastCorruptedRecord3-4ED_33.korean: 후후, 이러는 편이 더 친근해 보여서 좋잖아?&n아니면, 나랑 계속 거리를 두고 싶은 거야? 그건 좀 섭섭한데…

LastCorruptedRecord3-4ED_34.english: … Now is the time to make a big decision…!

LastCorruptedRecord3-4ED_35.english: Ah! … She ran away. Did I tease her too much?

LastCorruptedRecord3-4ED_5.english: I could hear the sound of sniffling through the panel as you returned.
LastCorruptedRecord3-4ED_5.korean: 복귀하면서 훌쩍거리는 소리가 패널을 통해 다 들리던데?

LastCorruptedRecord3-4ED_7.english: No. The installments aren't even finished yet.
LastCorruptedRecord3-4ED_7.korean: 안 돼. 아직 할부도 안 끝났어.

LastCorruptedRecord3-4ED_9.english: I'm really sorry for suddenly running out alone, for saying such foolish things, and for causing you worry!
LastCorruptedRecord3-4ED_9.korean: 갑자기 혼자 뛰쳐나간 것도, 바보 같은 말만 한 것도,&n걱정 끼쳐드려서… 정말 죄송해요!

LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_1.english: [c][00FF00][Dana, seeing the traces of the attack on the soldiers, the identity of the connector has been revealed.][-][/c]
LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_1.korean: [c][00FF00][다나, 병사들을 공격한 흔적을 보고 연결체의 정체가 판명 됐어.][-][/c]

LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_10.english: So, even if it means getting hurt and breaking, I will put people before myself—
LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_10.korean: 그러니까, 제가 다치고 부서지는 한이 있더라도 저보다는 사람들을 먼저ㅡ

LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_13.english: [c][00FF00][Dana, I know very well what kind of mindset you have when you decide to fight. I have no intention of carelessly breaking such a heavy resolve.][-][/c]
LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_13.korean: [c][00FF00][다나 네가 어떤 마음으로 싸우려는지 잘 알고 있어.&n그런 무거운 각오를 내가 함부로 꺾을 생각도 없어.][-][/c]

LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_14.english: [c][00FF00][But if you keep pushing yourself like that, treating yourself like a sinner, you will eventually lose yourself.][-][/c]
LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_14.korean: [c][00FF00][하지만 그렇게 스스로를 죄인 취급하며 계속 몰아붙이다 보면, 언젠가 너 자신을 잃어버리고 말 거야.][-][/c]

LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_15.english: It doesn't matter... because I was someone who should have died back then anyway.
LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_15.korean: 상관없어요… 어차피 저는 그때 죽었어야 하는 사람이니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_16.english: [c][00FF00][There is no one in the world who should have died.][-][/c]

LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_17.english: [c][00FF00][For you, who have once lost everything, the desire to 'save people' will be the driving force that puts your body into action immediately.][-][/c]
LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_17.korean: [c][00FF00][한 번 모든 걸 잃은 너에겐, '사람들을 구하고 싶다'는 마음이 당장 몸을 움직이게 하는 원동력이 되겠지.][-][/c]

LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_18.english: [c][00FF00][But if you keep enduring by gnawing away at yourself, you will eventually lose your strength again and end up in a position where you just watch, like before.][-][/c]
LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_18.korean: [c][00FF00][하지만 자신을 갉아먹으며 버티다 보면 결국 다시 힘을 잃고, 예전처럼 바라만 보는 입장이 될 거야.][-][/c]

LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_19.english: [c][00FF00][Then the world will return to its daily routine where you can't do anything. Do you… really want that future?][-][/c]
LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_19.korean: [c][00FF00][그럼 세상은 또 네가 아무것도 못하는 일상으로 돌아가겠지. 그 미래를… 정말 원해?][-][/c]

LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_2.english: [c][00FF00]['Stalker', a connector that lures enemies into a false sense of security and eliminates them by sniping them from a distance.][-][/c]
LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_2.korean: [c][00FF00]['스토커', 적들을 방심시켜 유인하고, 멀리서 저격하여 제거하는 연결체야.][-][/c]

LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_21.english: Every time I close my eyes… I see the faces of my younger siblings who died in front of me, and I hear their screams… Since waking up, I have thought dozens of times, ‘If only I could go back to that time.’
LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_21.korean: 눈을 감을 때마다… 제 앞에서 죽어버린 동생들의 모습이 보이고, 비명 소리가 들려요…&n깨어난 뒤로 ‘그때로 돌아갈 수만 있다면’이라고 수십 번은 생각했어요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_22.english: So, I can't afford the luxury of taking care of my body... To ensure that never happens again, I have to fight until I collapse.
LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_22.korean: 그래서 제 몸을 돌보는 사치 같은 건… 할 수 없어요.&n다시는 그런 일을 만들지 않으려면, 제가 쓰러질 때까지 싸워야만 해요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_23.english: In the midst of this contradiction… I really don’t know what to do…
LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_23.korean: 이 모순 속에서… 어떻게 해야 할지... 저는 정말 모르겠어요…

LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_24.english: … Hey, the world has become so chaotic now that the word 'daily life' has even been distorted, hasn't it?
LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_24.korean: …저기, 지금은 일상이란 단어가 변질될 정도로 혼란스러운 세상이 됐잖아?

LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_25.english: There are times when a friend you were laughing and chatting with yesterday disappears the next day, and an ordinary small village turns to ashes and vanishes in an instant…
LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_25.korean: 어제까지 웃고 떠들던 친구가 다음날 다시는 볼 수 없게 되고, 평범한 작은 마을이 순식간에 재가 되어 사라지는 일도 있어…

LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_26.english: I guess the reality is that such unbelievable things happened.
LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_26.korean: 그런 거짓말 같은 일들이 일어난 게 현실이라는 거겠지.

LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_27.english: I won't give you the cliché that you just need to get used to it. Besides, that's not even possible.
LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_27.korean: 익숙해져야 된다는 뻔한 말은 하지 않을 게.&n그럴 수도 없고.

LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_28.english: As I said before, I lost people who were precious to me. However, I do not regret what happened back then.
LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_28.korean: 아까도 말했지만, 나는 소중한 사람들을 잃었어.&n하지만, 그때의 일을 후회하지 않아.

LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_29.english: Because I know very well who I need to protect right now.
LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_29.korean: 지금 내가 지켜야 할 대상이 누군지 잘 알고 있으니까.

LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_3.english: [c][00FF00][Because they thoroughly hide their location, you cannot find the stalker's location by moving blindly.][-][/c]
LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_3.korean: [c][00FF00][철저하게 자신의 위치를 숨기기 때문에 무작정 움직여서는 스토커의 위치를 찾을 수 없어.][-][/c]

LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_30.english: And, there is one thing you absolutely must know.
LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_30.korean: 그리고, 한 가지 꼭 알아두어야 하는 게 있어.

LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_32.english: The fact that we are alive like this is proof that the people who left wanted us to survive.
LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_32.korean: 우리가 이렇게 살아 있다는 건— 떠난 사람들이 '우리가 살아남길 바랐다'는 증거라는 걸.

LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_34.english: So… take care of yourself a little. Laugh and chat, eat delicious food, and go on dates with someone you like every now and then.
LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_34.korean: 그러니까… 조금은 자신을 돌봐.&n웃고 떠들고, 맛있는 것도 먹고, 가끔은 좋아하는 사람이랑 데이트도 하고.

LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_35.english: Even if it has to be on behalf of those who have left… because that is what everyone wants.
LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_35.korean: 떠난 사람들을 대신해서라도… 그게 모두가 바라는 일이니까.

LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_36.english: I, too, once lived clinging to just one goal.
LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_36.korean: 나도 한때는 한 가지 목적만 붙잡고 살았어.

LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_37.english: Even if you achieve your goal, what you lost won't return, yet I deceived myself by calling it 'the reason I'm alive.'
LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_37.korean: 목적을 이뤄도 잃은 것들은 돌아오지 않는데, ‘살아 있는 이유’라며 스스로를 속였지.

LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_38.english: But, Alcyone and the Master let me know that I am not alone. And that I can smile again.
LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_38.korean: 하지만, 알키오네 언니와 주인님이 내가 혼자가 아니라는 걸 알려줬어.&n그리고 내가 다시 웃을 수 있다는 것도.

LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_39.english: So, I can laugh with everyone like this again.
LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_39.korean: 그러니까 나는 다시 이렇게 모두와 웃을 수 있어.

LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_4.english: [c][00FF00][First off, moving safely so as not to become a target of the stalkerㅡ][-][/c]
LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_4.korean: [c][00FF00][우선 지금은 스토커의 목표가 되지 않도록 안전하게 움직이는 게ㅡ][-][/c]

LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_41.english: [c][00FF00][All three of you! There is a Iron Bug nearby! A sniper is coming!][-][/c]
LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_41.korean: [c][00FF00][세 사람 모두! 인근에 철충의 반응이 있어!&n저격이 올 거야!][-][/c]

LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_44.english: I told you, didn't I? That I would definitely protect the two of them!

LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_46.english: I just traced the trajectory of the attack and figured out where the stalker is!
LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_46.korean: 지금 공격의 궤적을 역추적해서 스토커의 위치가 어딘지 알아냈어!

LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_47.english: I'll block the escape route so you can't run away anywhere else!
LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_47.korean: 다른 곳으로 도망치지 못하게 내가 도주로를 막을 게!

LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_48.english: Sister Alcyone and Dana, get close and attack him!
LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_48.korean: 알키오네 언니와 다나는 녀석에게 근접해 공격해줘!

LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_5.english: … I am grateful to the Commander.

LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_50.english: … Yes, I can move! I can do it!
LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_50.korean: …네, 움직일 수 있어요! 할 수 있어요!

LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_51.english: Alright! Then let's go! Don't worry about the snipers, I'll block them!
LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_51.korean: 좋아! 그럼 가보자고! 저격은 신경쓰지마 내가 막을 테니까!

LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_52.english: You only think about attacking him!
LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_52.korean: 넌 오직 녀석을 공격하는 것만 생각해!

LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_6.english: He saved me, and he also granted my stubborn insistence on wanting to save people.
LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_6.korean: 저를 구해주셨고, 사람들을 구하고 싶다는 제 고집도 들어주셨어요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_7.english: You said I deserve your kindness, but... I'm still not sure. So, please don't be considerate of me anymore.
LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_7.korean: 제가 호의를 받을 자격이 있다고 말씀하셨지만… 아직 잘 모르겠어요.&n그러니까, 더 이상 제게 배려하지 마세요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_8.english: I… don’t deserve praise, worry, or gratitude.
LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_8.korean: 저는… 칭찬도, 걱정도, 고마움도 받을 자격이 없어요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_9.english: I think it is a punishment given to me to atone for being unable to protect even this power or anything else.
LastCorruptedRecord3-4MD_9.korean: 이 힘도 아무것도 지킬 수 없던 제게 속죄하라고 내려진 벌이라고 생각해요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-4OP_10.english: You're a cutie because you're as cute as my little sister Meropé. So, what's the question?
LastCorruptedRecord3-4OP_10.korean: 내 동생 메로페처럼 귀여우니까 귀염둥이지.&n그래서 질문이 뭔데?

LastCorruptedRecord3-4OP_12.english: Uh… it’s a connector, though? A big, strong one.
LastCorruptedRecord3-4OP_12.korean: 어… 연결체는 연결체인데? 크고 강한 녀석.

LastCorruptedRecord3-4OP_14.english: Seriously, Alcyone. That doesn't make for a proper explanation.
LastCorruptedRecord3-4OP_14.korean: 정말, 알키오네 언니.&n그러면 설명이 제대로 안 되잖아.

LastCorruptedRecord3-4OP_15.english: The connector refers to a special entity that acts as the commander of the Iron Bug.
LastCorruptedRecord3-4OP_15.korean: 연결체는 철충의 지휘관 역할을 하는 특수개체를 말해.

LastCorruptedRecord3-4OP_16.english: Usually, Iron Bug move mindlessly so they are easy to deal with, but it changes if there is a Link.
LastCorruptedRecord3-4OP_16.korean: 보통의 경우 철충은 생각없이 움직여서 상대하기 쉽지만, 연결체가 있으면 달라져.

LastCorruptedRecord3-4OP_17.english: They exhibit tactical movements, such as digging traps or attacking from the rear. That is why they are annoying and dangerous Iron Bugs.
LastCorruptedRecord3-4OP_17.korean: 함정을 파거나 후방을 치는 등 전술적인 움직임을 보이거든.&n그래서 성가시고 위험한 철충이야.

LastCorruptedRecord3-4OP_18.english: Such dangerous Iron Bugs are here…

LastCorruptedRecord3-4OP_2.english: [c][00FF00][Yeah, I'm sure of it. This is a trace of a 'connector'.][-][/c]

LastCorruptedRecord3-4OP_21.english: Seriously, I told you not to hug me so suddenly like that!
LastCorruptedRecord3-4OP_21.korean: 정말, 그러니까 그렇게 갑자기 껴안지 말라니까~!

LastCorruptedRecord3-4OP_22.english: No matter what happens, I will protect the two of them!
LastCorruptedRecord3-4OP_22.korean: 무슨 일이 있어도 내가 두 사람을 지킬 테니까!

LastCorruptedRecord3-4OP_23.english: Besides, we have a master, don't we?

LastCorruptedRecord3-4OP_24.english: I believe it. That with Master by my side, we can all return safely!
LastCorruptedRecord3-4OP_24.korean: 나는 믿어.&n주인님과 함께라면 모두 무사히 돌아갈 수 있을 거라고!

LastCorruptedRecord3-4OP_25.english: Yeah, I trust you, Master, too. And since you're not the only one protecting me! I'll protect you too!
LastCorruptedRecord3-4OP_25.korean: 응, 나도 주인님을 믿어.&n그리고 언니만 지키는 게 아니니까! 나도 지킬 거야!

LastCorruptedRecord3-4OP_26.english: Alright! Then, shall we begin the mission?

LastCorruptedRecord3-4OP_28.english: [c][00FF00][Soldiers currently isolated on the defensive line are at the marked coordinates.][-][/c]
LastCorruptedRecord3-4OP_28.korean: [c][00FF00][현재 방어선에 고립된 병사들은 표시한 좌표에 있어.][-][/c]

LastCorruptedRecord3-4OP_29.english: [c][00FF00][Time is of the essence, so we have to hurry.][-][/c]

LastCorruptedRecord3-4OP_3.english: So that means it's a big catch? Looks like I'm going to have a proper hunt for the first time in a while!
LastCorruptedRecord3-4OP_3.korean: 그럼 월척이라는 거네?&n오랜만에 제대로 된 사냥을 하겠는걸!
