LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_20.korean: 특정 지역에서 알 수 없는 균열이 생겼다는 보고가 들어왔거든.

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_21.english: It looks like there is no way to resolve this unless I go and check it out myself. It doesn't seem like Iron Bug are the cause, so if you don't want to go, Dana can stay here—
LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_21.korean: 이것만큼은 내가 직접 가서 확인하지 않으면 해결할 방법이 없어 보여.&n딱히 철충이 원인은 아닌 거 같으니까 가고 싶지 않으면 다나는 여기 있어도ㅡ

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_22.english: Don't talk nonsense. There's no way he would let me go alone.
LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_22.korean: 이상한 소리 하지 마세요.&n오빠를 혼자 보낼 리가 없잖아요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_23.english: Besides, since it's an investigation, you must be very busy, so you'll need an assistant to help you out, right?
LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_23.korean: 게다가 조사라면 많이 바쁠 텐데, 손발이 되어줄 조수도 필요하죠?

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_24.english: Haha, got it. Then I'll rely on Dana a bit this time.
LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_24.korean: 하하, 알겠어. 그럼 이번엔 다나한테 좀 기대 볼게.

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_26.english: I'll finish getting ready. Do you want to say hello to the others in the meantime?
LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_26.korean: 나는 마저 준비할게. 그동안 다른 애들이랑 인사라도 나눌래?

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_28.english: Oh, isn't that our cutie Dana?

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_29.english: Ugh... I can't get used to that nickname, no matter how many times I hear it...
LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_29.korean: 읏… 그 애칭은 몇 번을 들어도 익숙해지지 않네요…

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_3.english: I learned that it is polite not to answer a question with a question.
LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_3.korean: 질문엔 질문으로 대답하지 않는 게 예의라고 배웠어요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_30.english: I'll keep calling you until you get used to it~ What brings you here?
LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_30.korean: 익숙해질 때까지 계속 불러줄게~ 여긴 무슨 일로 왔어?

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_31.english: Wait, I stopped by to say hello before heading out on my mission.
LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_31.korean: 잠깐, 임무를 나가기 전에 인사드리러 왔어요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_32.english: Really? We haven't even talked much yet, that's a shame... but it can't be helped.
LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_32.korean: 그래? 아직 이야기도 많이 못 했는데 아쉽네… 그래도 어쩔 수 없지.

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_33.english: By the way, have you gotten used to your new life yet?

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_34.english: … I’m not really sure. To be honest, it still doesn’t feel real that I’ve been asleep for so long.
LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_34.korean: …잘 모르겠어요.&n사실, 아직도 오래 잠들어 있었다는 게 실감이 잘 안 나서요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_35.english: Hmm… of course that could happen. Waking up to find monsters running rampant and the world collapsing—you’d probably wish it were just a dream.
LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_35.korean: 음… 당연히 그럴 수 있어.&n깨어나 보니 괴물은 날뛰고, 세계는 무너지는 중이라니—차라리 꿈이면 좋겠다고 느끼겠지.

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_36.english: Still, even if it is a reality I don't want to believe, even if it is a dream I don't want to wake from...
LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_36.korean: 그래도 말이야, 믿고 싶지 않은 현실이라 해도, 깨고 싶지 않은 꿈이라도…

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_37.english: Dreams are bound to end eventually. Because there are precious things outside that are not in the dream.
LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_37.korean: 꿈이라는 건 언젠가는 깨는 법이야.&n꿈 속에는 없는 소중한 게 밖에는 있으니까.

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_38.english: So, our little cutie Dana will definitely find it someday too.
LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_38.korean: 그러니, 우리 귀염둥이 다나도 언젠가 반드시 찾아낼 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_39.english: Sister Alcyone... thank you for the advice.

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_40.english: And—please take good care of my master!

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_43.english: Well, I have to leave here for a mission for the time being, so I came to say goodbye. I couldn't just leave without seeing your face.
LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_43.korean: 그게, 당분간 임무로 여길 떠나게 돼서 인사하러 왔어.&n얼굴도 안 보고 그냥 갈 수는 없으니까.

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_44.english: You're so kind... Since you're here anyway, do you want to chat for a bit? It's nothing special, though...
LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_44.korean: 친절하네... 이왕 온 김에 잠깐 얘기라도 할래?&n별건 아니지만…

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_46.english: … I was born with a naturally smaller build compared to my older sisters.
LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_46.korean: …나는 태어날 때부터 선천적으로 다른 언니들에 비해 작은 체구를 가졌어.

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_47.english: She had high intelligence, but her physical condition was below average.

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_48.english: I thought it was okay, though. Even though I lacked strength, I could help my older sisters with my knowledge. It makes me angry to be called a kid, though…
LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_48.korean: 나는 그래도 괜찮다고 생각했어.&n힘은 부족해도 내 지식으로 언니들을 도울 수 있었으니까.&n꼬맹이라는 소리를 듣는 건 화나지만…

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_49.english: But when I realized that everything was useless in the face of real 'power,' I felt like my heart was breaking. I hated myself so much for not having the strength to protect anything.
LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_49.korean: 하지만 진짜 ‘힘’ 앞에서 모든 게 소용없다는 걸 알았을 땐 마음이 무너지는 줄 알았어.&n지킬 힘이 없는 나 자신이 너무 싫었거든.

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_50.english: When I had lost everything and collapsed, 'someone' took me in, and...
LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_50.korean: 모든 걸 잃고 쓰러져 있을 때, ‘어떤 분’이 날 거두어 줬고…

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_51.english: You gave me the strength to move again. After that, I met my master and regained my current daily life.
LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_51.korean: 다시 움직일 힘을 주셨어. 그 뒤로 주인님을 만나 지금의 일상을 되찾았지.

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_52.english: Thanks to you, I have survived until now. It is a debt I can never repay in my lifetime.
LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_52.korean: 덕분에 나는 지금까지 살아남았어.&n평생 갚지 못할 빚이야.

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_53.english: Master will probably nag a lot. Like, 'Take care of yourself,' and things like that?
LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_53.korean: 주인님은 아마 잔소리를 많이 할 거야.&n'자신도 돌봐라' 그런 거?

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_54.english: The one who is actually the worst at keeping it is you, Master...
LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_54.korean: 정작 그걸 제일 못 지키는 건 주인님이지만…

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_55.english: Still, I think that comes from the desire for them not to resemble you.
LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_55.korean: 그래도 그건 자신을 닮지 않았으면 하는 마음에서 나오는 거라고 생각해.

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_56.english: So, I hope Dana takes good care of Master. He is always affectionate and gentle, but he is also reckless.
LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_56.korean: 그러니 다나가 주인님을 잘 챙겨줬으면 좋겠어.&n항상 다정하고 상냥하지만, 무모한 주인님이니까.

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_57.english: Yeah, don't worry! I'll keep a close eye on you!
LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_57.korean: 응, 걱정 마!&n오빠는 내가 잘 감시할 테니까!

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_58.english: I just got back. I just finished getting ready.

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_62.english: Dana, are you feeling sick or tired?
LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_62.korean: 다나, 혹시 어디 아프거나 피곤하진 않아?

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_63.english: What? Not at all! On the contrary, I'm full of energy!

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_64.english: Alright then, let's do our best on this mission!

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_65.english: Yes! I look forward to working with you as well.

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_66.english: Then, shall we go? To the unknown land!

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_67.english: … We’re not going there just to play, are we?

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_68.english: This is the place where the crack formed.

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_69.english: It's strange. There definitely isn't anything in front of me... but a crack has appeared... and there's something like a strange passageway...
LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_69.korean: 이상해요, 분명 앞에 아무것도 없는데...&n균열이 생겨서… 이상한 통로 같은 게 있어요…

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_71.english: That is what I’m thinking… but if it’s too difficult, we can look into it again next time.
LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_71.korean: 그럴 생각인데…&n혹시 힘들다면 다음에 다시 조사해도ㅡ

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_72.english: It's okay! We've come this far, so we can't just go back without doing anything.
LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_72.korean: 괜찮아요! 여기까지 왔는데&n아무것도 안하고 돌아갈 수는 없어요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_73.english: Now, hurry up and go inside!

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_75.english: … It won't be long now. Dana, you can do it.
LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_75.korean: …이제 머지않았어.&n다나, 너라면 할 수 있을 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_78.english: We definitely came in together, so why…

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_8.english: What do you mean...? That it's because of me...?

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_84.english: Where are you!? I'll be right there! I'll make sure to keep my promise this time! So please....
LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_84.korean: 어디에요!? 제가 지금 갈게요! 이번에는 꼭 지킬 테니니까!&n그러니까 제발....

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_86.english: Why are you the only one who survived…

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_87.english: Why are you the only one alive, unnie...?

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_89.english: No… No…! I wasn’t trying to save only myself…!
LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_89.korean: 아니야… 아니에요…! 저만 살려고 한 게 아니에요…!

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_92.english: … You survived so tenaciously, and yet you can't even face something this small?
LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_92.korean: …그렇게 악착같이 살아남았으면서, 겨우 이 정도도 마주하지 못하는 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_93.english: So, in the end, you too are destined to remain a fake.
LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_93.korean: 너도 결국… 가짜로 남을 수밖에 없는 운명이란 거네.

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_95.english: Yes, it's fake! Your survival, the kindness you received, the faith, and even this world right now—it's all fake.
LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_95.korean: 그래 가짜야!&n네가 살아남은 것도, 받은 상냥함도, 믿음도, 지금 이 세계도 전부 다 가짜.

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_96.english: There isn't a single truth left for you.
LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_96.korean: 네게 남은 진실은 단 하나도 없어.

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_97.english: Pfft~ Isn't that hilarious? To think it's real when everything is just fake~ It's so funny~ It's so shoddy I'm speechless~
LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_97.korean: 푸흡~ 정말 웃기지 않아?&n모든 게 가짜로만 이루어진 진짜라니~ 정말 웃겨~ 너무 허접해서 말도 안 나오네~

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_98.english: What nerve do you have to keep living? No matter what, you're only acting to satisfy yourself in the end, aren't you?
LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_98.korean: 대체 무슨 낯짝으로 살아가는 걸까?&n이러나저러나 결국 네가 만족하기 위해서 움직일 뿐이잖아?

LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_99.english: You don't even consider others' feelings, and don't you know very well what kind of ending the kindness you showed based on your own standards met?
LastCorruptedRecord3-5OP_99.korean: 남의 입장은 생각하지도 않고, 네 기준으로 베푼 호의가 어떤 결말을 맞이했는지… 너도 잘 알지 않아?

LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_1.english: - Hmm, so to summarize the story in one sentence…
LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_1.korean: - 음, 그러니까 이야기를 한 마디로 정리하면…

LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_10.english: I wish there were another quick and easy way… like converting an abandoned facility somewhere…
LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_10.korean: - 다른 빠르고 쉬운 방법이 있으면 좋겠는데… 어디에 버려진 시설을 개조한다거나…

LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_14.english: To be honest, I had already made something similar by experimenting with various things before you even mentioned it.
LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_14.korean: 사실을 말하자면 오빠가 얘기하기도 전에 이것저것 실험하면서 이미 비슷한 걸 만들어 뒀어.

LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_15.english: It might need some adjustments if you're going to use it for training, but you should be able to test it out right away today.
LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_15.korean: 훈련에 사용할 거면 조정이 좀 필요하겠지만, 오늘 당장이라도 테스트해 볼 수 있을 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_16.english: Hehehe, if I was of help to you, then all the hard work was worth it.
LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_16.korean: 에헤헤, 오빠의 도움이 되었다면 고생한 보람이 있네.

LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_17.english: Oh, and just so you know in advance, since you might be worried, we use the same device but the server is different, so it won't affect your existing game data at all.
LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_17.korean: 아, 그리고 걱정할 것 같아서 미리 말해두는데,&n같은 장치를 쓰지만 서버가 달라서 기존 게임 데이터랑은 전혀 영향이 없을 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_18.english: Excuse me, Commander? What is it? I understand it is about the new training facility, but...
LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_18.korean: 저기 사령관? 무슨 얘기인가요?&n새로운 훈련 시설에 관한 거라는 건 알겠는데…

LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_19.english: Is this related to the large machine labeled SH S?
LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_19.korean: 이 S. H. S 라고 적힌 큰 기계와 관련된 건가요?

LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_2.english: Yes, I think the fight against the Iron Bug will become even more intense in the future.
LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_2.korean: 네, 앞으로 철충과의 싸움이 더 격렬해질 거라고 생각해요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_22.english: [c][00FF00][Tiamat, Mina! The target has gone that way!][-][/c]

LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_26.english: He spotted us too! Looks like he's trying to run away!

LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_29.english: It's okay! I just lost my balance from the attack! Yaaah!

LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_3.english: So, the idea came up among us that we wanted to train in highly realistic simulated combat... but I suppose it would be difficult to do it so suddenly, right?
LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_3.korean: 그래서 저희들 사이에서 실전성 높은 모의 전투를 훈련하고 싶다는 얘기가 나왔는데…&n역시 이렇게 갑자기는 힘들겠죠?

LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_30.english: That's it! That guy's shield generator is broken!
LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_30.korean: 됐어! 녀석의 방어막 생성 장치가 부숴졌어!

LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_32.english: Is it finally my turn? I'm exhausted from waiting...

LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_33.english: [c][00FF00][You’re going to end it spectacularly, just as long as we’ve waited!][-][/c]

LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_35.english: Shortly after, the Striker members returned after finishing combat training.
LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_35.korean: - 잠시 후, 스트라이커 멤버들이 전투 훈련을 마치고 돌아왔다.

LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_38.english: From our perspective, we think we did a good job...

LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_39.english: Of course it wouldn't be perfect, would it?

LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_4.english: Yes… but isn’t that putting the Commander in a difficult position?
LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_4.korean: 네… 그렇지만, 사령관을 곤란하게 만드는 건 아닌가요?

LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_40.english: Ah, then I'll go into the water.
LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_40.korean: 아, 그럼 나 물에 들어가 볼래.

LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_41.english: Huh? Then me too! It's been a really long time since I've been to a beach like this.
LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_41.korean: 어? 그럼 나도! 이런 바닷가에 오는 건 정말 오랜만이야.

LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_42.english: Ah, to think you're leaving me behind! Wait for me! I'll come with you!
LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_42.korean: 앗, 본녀를 두고 가다니! 기다리세요! 저도 같이 가겠사와요!

LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_44.english: Ah, yes… I’m still fascinated by the fact that this is virtual reality.
LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_44.korean: 아, 네… 저는 아직 여기가 가상 현실이라는 게 신기해서요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_45.english: On top of that, it perfectly recreates even the Iron Bug (Iron Bugs)... With this, it seems like I can practice as much training as I want.
LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_45.korean: 게다가 철충까지 완벽하게 재현하고…&n이거라면 원하는 훈련을 얼마든지 연습할 수 있을 것 같네요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_46.english: I knew you had heard that the Commander has been playing virtual reality games recently, but is that okay? Even if we use something like this for training...
LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_46.korean: 사령관이 최근에 가상 현실 게임을 하신다는 건 들어서 알고 있었지만, 괜찮은 건가요?&n이런 걸 저희가 훈련하는 데 사용해도…

LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_47.english: I think the situation was just good in the battle a little while ago.
LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_47.korean: 조금 전의 전투는 그저 상황이 좋았다고 생각해요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_48.english: If I were alone, I wouldn't have been able to destroy the shield generator of the fleeing Iron Bug.
LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_48.korean: 저 혼자였다면 도망치는 철충의 방어막 발생 장치를 부수진 못했을 거예요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_49.english: We were able to destroy it because Mina helped, but Mina was originally supposed to protect Ullr and Mercury.
LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_49.korean: 미나가 도와줬기 때문에 부술 수 있었지만, 미나는 원래 우르와 머큐리를 지켜줬어야 했어요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_50.english: If there had been two enemies and I had attacked them while Mina was coming to help me… it would have been very dangerous.
LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_50.korean: 만약, 적이 둘이었고 미나가 저를 도와주러 오는 틈을 노려 두 사람을 공격했다면… 많이 위험했겠죠.

LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_51.english: Oh, I didn't mean it that way. Of course, it would be nice if the number of people increased, but...
LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_51.korean: 앗, 그런 의미로 말씀드린 건 아니었어요.&n물론 인원이 늘어나면 좋겠지만…

LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_52.english: Yes! … Then I’ll go see everyone too!

LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_53.english: Is it a new member who can act alongside Tiamat and respond to various situations…
LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_53.korean: - 티아멧과 함께 행동하고 다양한 상황에 대응할 수 있는 새로운 인원인가…

LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_54.english: So you're saying you need a new training facility?

LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_55.english: That can't be true. They gathered their opinions after much deliberation to protect everyone, didn't they?
LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_55.korean: 그럴 리가. 모두를 지키기 위한 고민 끝에 의견을 모아준 거잖아?

LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_56.english: Do you think I would have trouble working for Orca?
LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_56.korean: 내가 오르카를 위해 일하는 걸 곤란해할 거라고 생각해?

LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_57.english: Thank you for understanding right away.

LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_59.english: Maybe a really good idea came to mind.
LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_59.korean: 어쩌면 아주 좋은 방법이 떠오른 걸지도 몰라.

LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_6.english: - In fact, the need for a new training facility had been in mind for some time.
LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_6.korean: - 사실, 새로운 훈련 시설의 필요성은 이전부터 염두하고 있었다.

LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_60.english: As expected of you, Doctor. I believed in you.

LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_61.english: Tiamat, can you bring the other strikers?
LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_61.korean: 티아멧, 다른 스트라이커 애들을 데리고 와줄래?

LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_62.english: Say that you will try the training test right away today.
LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_62.korean: 오늘 바로 훈련 테스트를 해본다고 말하고.

LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_63.english: Tell them to brace themselves because they might be surprised.
LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_63.korean: 깜짝 놀랄 수도 있으니까 마음 단단히 먹고 오라고 해줘.

LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_65.english: Yeah, it was perfect. We had great chemistry together, too.
LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_65.korean: 그래, 완벽했어. 서로 간에 호흡도 좋았고.

LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_66.english: You must be tired. Let's stop here for today and rest. Good job everyone.
LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_66.korean: 지쳤을 테니까. 오늘은 여기까지 하고 쉬자. 다들 수고했어.

LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_68.english: It's fine, since it's just for testing purposes. How was the actual combat?
LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_68.korean: 괜찮아, 테스트가 목적이니까. 실제로 전투를 해보니까 어때?

LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_69.english: Does that mean more personnel are needed to handle various situations?
LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_69.korean: 다양한 상황에 대응할 수 있는 인원이 더 필요하다는 건가.

LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_7.english: With the number of new members increasing significantly, a place to experiment with various tactics would be necessary.
LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_7.korean: - 새로운 대원들도 많이 늘어났고, 그에 따른 다양한 전술을 실험해 볼 장소도 필요하겠지.

LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_70.english: Thanks for the feedback, I'll think about it.

LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_8.english: However, building a facility takes a lot of time, from site selection and designing the training facility to securing construction materials and starting construction.
LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_8.korean: - 하지만 시설을 짓자면 부지 선정부터 훈련 시설의 설계, 건축 자재 확보, 착공까지 많은 시간이 들어.

LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_9.english: We would also have to hold a meeting to hear the opinions of each commander...
LastCorruptedRecord3-6ED_9.korean: - 회의도 열어서 각 대장들의 의견도 들어야 할 테고…

LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_1.english: Since then, the Strikers members and the mysterious girl participated in combat training disguised as actual combat, and returned safely after completing their mission.
LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_1.korean: - 그 이후로 스트라이커즈 멤버과 의문의 소녀는 실전을 가장한 전투 훈련에 참여했고, 무사히 임무를 마치고 돌아왔다.

LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_10.english: No! I'm not that stupid! It's just... I lost my memory!
LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_10.korean: 아냐! 그 정도로 멍청하지 않아!&n그냥... 기억을 잃어서 그래!

LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_11.english: Anyway, since I've forgotten all my names... when you call me from now on... um...
LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_11.korean: 아무튼 이름도 전부 잊어버렸으니까… 앞으로 날 부를 땐… 음…

LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_12.english: Ah! Here! Do you see the tattoo on my thigh over here? It's faint, but you should be able to see it.
LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_12.korean: 아! 여기! 이쪽 내 허벅지에 새겨진 문신 보여? 희미하긴 하지만 보일 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_13.english: Right! Fnel! Call me that from now on!
LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_13.korean: 그래! 에프넬! 앞으로 나를 그렇게 불러!

LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_15.english: How long on earth are you going to keep staring at my thighs!! You pervert!
LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_15.korean: 도대체 언제까지 내 허벅지를 뚫어져라 쳐다보고 있을 건데!! 이 변태야!

LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_16.english: … Commander, if you do not mind, may I ask the reason?

LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_17.english: I mean that you had Mr. Efnell participate in combat training with us.
LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_17.korean: 에프넬 씨를 우리와 함께 전투 훈련에 참여시키신 것 말이에요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_18.english: Ah, please don't misunderstand! It's not that I have a complaint... Epnel was really strong. She rushed in faster than anyone and took down the Iron Bug.
LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_18.korean: 아, 오해는 하지 말아주세요! 불만이 있어서가 아니라…&n에프넬 씨는 정말 강했어요. 누구보다 빠르게 달려들어 철충을 쓰러트렸죠.

LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_19.english: But… it looks like she’s fighting all alone in loneliness…
LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_19.korean: 하지만… 마치 외롭게 혼자 싸우는 것처럼 보여서…

LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_2.english: Alright then, hand over the money as promised.
LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_2.korean: 자, 그럼 약속대로 어서 돈 줘.

LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_20.english: I tried to help, but they refused.

LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_21.english: I explained to Tiamat what had happened in the virtual reality game so far.
LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_21.korean: - 나는 지금까지 가상현실 게임에서 있었던 일들을 티아멧에게 설명했다.

LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_22.english: In that case… did you come from the same place, Ms. Fnel?
LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_22.korean: 그렇다면… 에프넬 씨도 같은 곳에서 온 건가요?

LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_23.english: Okay! Then I'll help you too!

LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_24.english: I don't really know why, but... looking at Fnel brings back memories from the past.
LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_24.korean: 이유는 잘 모르겠지만… 에프넬 씨를 보고 있으면 예전의 기억이 떠올라요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_25.english: The nightmarish days at the research institute…

LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_26.english: So… I don’t know what you are holding onto, Fnel, but please let me help.
LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_26.korean: 그러니까… 에프넬 씨가 안고 있는 게 뭔지는 모르겠지만, 제가 도울 수 있도록 해주세요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_29.english: Yes... I've calmed down. Thank you. Please don't worry. I don't really care about past memories anymore.
LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_29.korean: 네... 진정됐어요. 감사해요.&n걱정하지 말아주세요. 이제는 예전 기억을 그렇게 신경 쓰지 않게 됐으니까요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_3.english: An account…? How could I possibly have one? Just give it to me in kind!
LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_3.korean: 계좌…? 나한테 그런 게 있을 리가 있냐? 깔끔하게 현물로 줘!

LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_30.english: Still, it's really amazing. When I'm held by the Commander like this, all the things I hated just disappear.
LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_30.korean: 그래도 정말 신기해요.&n이렇게 사령관에게 안겨 있으면 싫었던 일들이 전부 사라져요.

LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_32.english: Ah, um... then would it be better if I changed into a PS combat suit?
LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_32.korean: 아, 저기… 그럼 PS전투슈트로 갈아 입고 오는 게 좋을까요?

LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_33.english: The thing is... I mean... since it doesn't have a tail right now... all of Orca's tails belong to the Commander...
LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_33.korean: 그게… 그러니까… 지금은 꼬리가 없으니까…&n오르카의 모든 꼬리는 사령관의 것이라고…

LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_34.english: - We did talk about that... It seems I've become a tail enthusiast without even realizing it. Who is the one spreading the rumor that I like tails!
LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_34.korean: - 그런 얘기도 했었지… 내가 모르는 사이에 꼬리 애호가라도 된 모양이다.&n누구야 내가 꼬리를 좋아한다고 소문 낸 녀석이!

LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_35.english: - I can only think of one person, but…

LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_36.english: It's not wrong, so I have nothing to say...
LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_36.korean: - 틀린 말은 아니라서 할 말은 없네…

LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_38.english: You mean the salary? Okay, then can you give me your account number?
LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_38.korean: 보수 말이지? 알았어, 그럼 계좌를 알려 줄래?

LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_39.english: That’s a problem… Unfortunately, I don’t have the physical item.
LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_39.korean: 그건 곤란한데… 아쉽게도 현물은 가지고 있지 않아.

LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_4.english: What? Then what are you going to do about my pay!
LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_4.korean: 뭐? 그럼 내 보수는 어떻게 할 건데!

LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_40.english: You don't carry around a lot of money while on a mission, do you?
LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_40.korean: 임무 수행 중에 큰 돈을 들고 다니진 않잖아?

LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_41.english: Don't worry, I won't cheat you out.

LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_42.english: Once all the missions are finished, I will make sure to record everything and settle the accounts when I get back.
LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_42.korean: 모든 임무가 끝나면 확실히 기록해 뒀다가 돌아가서 정산해 줄 거야.

LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_43.english: Right, there are still Iron Bug's left to defeat.
LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_43.korean: 그래, 아직 쓰러트려야 할 철충이 남아 있거든.

LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_44.english: Instead, I’ll provide you with meals and a place to sleep in the meantime. You need that, right?
LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_44.korean: 대신 그 동안 식사와 잘 곳 정도는 마련해 줄게 필요하잖아?

LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_46.english: If you don't mind, won't you tell me your name?

LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_47.english: Do you perhaps not know the name?

LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_48.english: ...It says FN.el. How should I read that? F... F-nel?
LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_48.korean: ...F-N.el 라고 쓰여있네. 뭐라고 읽어야 하지? 에프… 에프넬?

LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_49.english: Okay, Fnel. Got it. But what is that barcode-like thing next to it...?
LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_49.korean: 좋아, 에프넬. 알았어. 그런데 옆에 있는 바코드 같은 건 뭐지…?

LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_5.english: All missions? Are you saying there are still more?
LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_5.korean: 모든 임무? 아직 더 남았다는 거야?

LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_50.english: I wonder if something will come out if I take a picture?

LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_51.english: Right... I guess I'll have to explain it to everyone.

LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_54.english: It felt like I was recalling a bad memory.
LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_54.korean: 안 좋은 기억을 떠올린 것 같았거든.

LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_55.english: Come see me anytime if you're having a hard time. I belong to everyone in Orca.
LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_55.korean: 힘든 일이 있으면 언제든 찾아와. 나는 오르카 모두의 것이니까.

LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_56.english: Combat suit? Why that all of a sudden?

LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_6.english: Are you telling me to believe that right now?

LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_7.english: Ugh, you... Remember this! If you take even a little bit, I'll make you pay the price!
LastCorruptedRecord3-7ED_7.korean: 크윽, 너어… 기억해 둬!&n조금이라도 떼먹었다만 대가를 치르게 해줄 테니까!

LastCorruptedRecord3-7OP_1.english: The Strikers' virtual reality combat training has begun in earnest.
LastCorruptedRecord3-7OP_1.korean: - 스트라이커즈의 가상현실 전투 훈련이 본격적으로 시작되었다.

LastCorruptedRecord3-7OP_10.english: - A new member of the Strikers... If she is a Bioroid who can adapt well with everyone...
LastCorruptedRecord3-7OP_10.korean: - 스트라이커즈의 새로운 멤버인가… 모두와 함께 잘 적응할 수 있는 바이오로이드라면…

LastCorruptedRecord3-7OP_11.english: [c][00FF00][This is… Tiamat. Commander, are you listening?][-][/c]

LastCorruptedRecord3-7OP_12.english: [c][00FF00][Training is over. All Iron Bugs have been defeated. No, they were defeated.][-][/c]
LastCorruptedRecord3-7OP_12.korean: [c][00FF00][훈련은 종료. 모든 철충을 쓰러트렸습니다.&n아니, 쓰러져 있었습니다.][-][/c]

LastCorruptedRecord3-7OP_13.english: [c][00FF00][By the time I arrived at the target point, an unidentified figure had already dealt with all the Iron Bug...][-][/c]
LastCorruptedRecord3-7OP_13.korean: [c][00FF00][제가 목표 지점에 도착했을 때는 이미 정체불명의 인물이 모든 철충을 처리한 상태였어요...][-][/c]

LastCorruptedRecord3-7OP_14.english: - An unidentified figure? Who on earth is it? There shouldn't be anyone here right now except for me and the Strikers.
LastCorruptedRecord3-7OP_14.korean: - 정체불명의 인물? 대체 누구지? 지금 여기는 나와 스트라이커즈 말고는 아무도 없을 텐데?

LastCorruptedRecord3-7OP_16.english: The doctor said that since the servers are different, there wouldn't be any influence, but the virtual reality devices themselves are the same. In that case…
LastCorruptedRecord3-7OP_16.korean: - 닥터는 서버가 다르니 서로 영향이 없을 거라고 했지만, 가상현실 장치 자체는 같은 걸 사용하고 있어. 그렇다면…

LastCorruptedRecord3-7OP_17.english: Is it that the impossible cannot exist...?
LastCorruptedRecord3-7OP_17.korean: - 있을 수 없는 일이란 있을 수 없다인가…

LastCorruptedRecord3-7OP_18.english: To think someone we don't know has entered virtual reality... who on earth could it be?
LastCorruptedRecord3-7OP_18.korean: 가상현실에 우리가 모르는 사람이 들어왔다니… 대체 누구일까요?

LastCorruptedRecord3-7OP_19.english: Could it be a ghost? Like the vengeful spirit of someone who died trapped in virtual reality, unable to escape…
LastCorruptedRecord3-7OP_19.korean: 혹시 귀신 아닐까? 가상현실에서 나가지 못하고 갇혀 죽은 사람의 원혼이라든가…

LastCorruptedRecord3-7OP_2.english: [c][00FF00][Tiamat, once you get out of that forest, there will be a swarm of Iron Bugs. There are quite a lot of them, so please be careful!][-][/c]
LastCorruptedRecord3-7OP_2.korean: [c][00FF00][티아멧, 그 숲을 빠져나가면 철충들이 몰려 있을 거예요.&n수가 상당히 많으니 주의하세요!][-][/c]

LastCorruptedRecord3-7OP_20.english: That can't be true! There are no such things as ghosts in this world!
LastCorruptedRecord3-7OP_20.korean: 그럴 리 없어요! 이 세상에 귀신 따위는 없사와요!

LastCorruptedRecord3-7OP_21.english: … Is Mercury perhaps afraid of ghosts?

LastCorruptedRecord3-7OP_22.english: Ahahaha… There’s no way I’d be afraid of something like a ghost… ?
LastCorruptedRecord3-7OP_22.korean: 아하하하… 제, 제가 귀신 따위를 무서워할 리가 없잖아요…?

LastCorruptedRecord3-7OP_25.english: Haa... I mean, why do I have to follow you just because that guy, the commander or whatever, calls me?
LastCorruptedRecord3-7OP_25.korean: 하아… 그러니까, 왜 내가 그 사령관인지 뭔지 하는 녀석이 부른다고 널 따라가야 하는 건데?

LastCorruptedRecord3-7OP_26.english: The Commander will be able to answer your questions. Um, I mean…
LastCorruptedRecord3-7OP_26.korean: 사령관이라면 당신이 궁금하신 것들을 답변해 주실 거예요.&n저, 그러니까…

LastCorruptedRecord3-7OP_27.english: Got it, got it! I won't run away, so stop holding me! It hurts! How are you so strong?
